name: Herschel Walker
subject: Distorting facts is what Democrats do best
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=8fbf62e17a8d4a83b14c1edfb7383e07&_e=QEqU83nUWytAp6w1_1aiv4E2cbRa71gkPuUt7O9aFcihyTWxyqeAqt2QM0cHnz5_1u83Ky8jpPgGGVf5_5GfJkY5g8vRThZ557ng1dDzC5g-WCBhAdk76Gqjz1_qjRY6doVs8YLZQaY2f-i2OomzzekeDL2yQT2RolOBmaAtCvOk0MNEuXrAjBcM7YYI2sdgnUgyc68a5QQQw3U5IjBoAGTTV_b0nWkU45nuS57dtOyRGEo7h8_aQGlmZgDDM53kSNRnAbAtawgAWoLY8f0b6ua9s0sOJO8VfvojgUFywVkZ6mGORLJKtGJq1Voc2srfO8j_oqoy-aRr3KHcjvgLt8OXYeoRp0_xYVYqiPxlv1eX746n_k8O6c-paOtzitJL8BBdFgF3xunRK12t51gp2mMkQZls9EPULKev_17MSP3aFq_3g_Xh44B8HoEJ6Rf4tMt-4PZa9D7-cR-rWj9BgAUTvCmpxMNbkN0dmUFu8Kw%3D)

---
Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=8fbf62e17a8d4a83b14c1edfb7383e07&_e=QEqU83nUWytAp6w1_1aiv4E2cbRa71gkPuUt7O9aFcihyTWxyqeAqt2QM0cHnz5_1u83Ky8jpPgGGVf5_5GfJkY5g8vRThZ557ng1dDzC5g-WCBhAdk76Gqjz1_qjRY6doVs8YLZQaY2f-i2OomzzekeDL2yQT2RolOBmaAtCvOk0MNEuXrAjBcM7YYI2sdgnUgyc68a5QQQw3U5IjBoAGTTV_b0nWkU45nuS57dtOyRGEo7h8_aQGlmZgDDM53kV2d42qbVPBz4vTyZUMhxvZBwHziJTN-k26PGOyoa65z6WS4TjYBQXi0U-TEBFvWwrxzhZ-mHHWzPT70TdU-STae0k7DTe01iM-XfADie62Y0aJKW93okoirsjJBl9i9YG4jGfYDbmpp1LQay87QVomnEJNk4CZ6GrSZ33ELTDk8yhbNuq3Dicxp5gbRFq02ACehl1bwx5td482xCFaei1QnmWJMYpgtKfOdGA7F2iCk%3D)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=8fbf62e17a8d4a83b14c1edfb7383e07&_e=QEqU83nUWytAp6w1_1aiv4E2cbRa71gkPuUt7O9aFcihyTWxyqeAqt2QM0cHnz5_1u83Ky8jpPgGGVf5_5GfJkY5g8vRThZ557ng1dDzC5g-WCBhAdk76Gqjz1_qjRY6doVs8YLZQaY2f-i2OomzzekeDL2yQT2RolOBmaAtCvOk0MNEuXrAjBcM7YYI2sdgnUgyc68a5QQQw3U5IjBoAGTTV_b0nWkU45nuS57dtOyRGEo7h8_aQGlmZgDDM53kE91NbUKXJGbchZUCszJBJJdi2N_P2UuhvBscsqVNRoDNnuxo-H7su7FU1Mi_N1cA_EC-flIkaIfx1lkMFrM5geAsp-t349vD34ZGvwNK8HfhqNVaVQAJixjofKUjQ5KuLbn0nWQWeBG5JnyvscXk5zNbnDt5L28A7eu5sgyFlwlvSkfLmbebOwC2Sx1xZUWUl02Nck8LGXMr7AcdVagTR5QNLW7E0HrQD1dxjpYE-18%3D)

body:
|

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9656a7bff6f1443ca65179b343b2f7dd&_e=3QfCt6PCMXoRA0U80SOPMy1DMGfCDU2DcMkA-B7kXJS-7EZEXBWA47un5viaCR_jXbUS_L8nEzdosunounV7yH7OIKgWz_jXKDQPjSQKu9oqku6UQI-4p-CtiFrZxQfZENYvV36c8WzREf1uekUY4KuCC4Z76-Gfj3FAFvn1M1bfezBx0MvsyTE9BcP-JjYXW733uJWbVNot6pQ-AIvLWcmtnq6eUkGvDaRX7S8EJFhsCNN31qnX36ocIc3xf3KSFL9lJKezIxaWVRgGo6yC-B_2URLFsL3nyIPI_AL30FSzZqJlm8LF51HBs9Yz9o3JAW9foC8yyVfFIrfhX7BXZpOPquupXd7sPla6hJlYtTnxWc0dVTnGvjtryf1GMvG7rcAmRg3dMGhOMM9oAkiiFSaxuy7PKeAFFXIX6c_V9QG0ls8u5zKAyZaFdXA_0QPE6cT8KFzMm2qZyP417QTeWKcAsZzCu_BkmAYg8-_5pSc%3D)

**SURVEY REQUEST:** It’s obvious: Democrats can no longer hide the fact they’re embracing socialism. **[Would you please spare a moment of your time to take our survey on socialism in America today?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9656a7bff6f1443ca65179b343b2f7dd&_e=3QfCt6PCMXoRA0U80SOPMy1DMGfCDU2DcMkA-B7kXJS-7EZEXBWA47un5viaCR_jXbUS_L8nEzdosunounV7yH7OIKgWz_jXKDQPjSQKu9oqku6UQI-4p-CtiFrZxQfZENYvV36c8WzREf1uekUY4KuCC4Z76-Gfj3FAFvn1M1bfezBx0MvsyTE9BcP-JjYXW733uJWbVNot6pQ-AIvLWcmtnq6eUkGvDaRX7S8EJFhsCNN31qnX36ocIc3xf3KSFL9lJKezIxaWVRgGo6yC-H7x2tOw_1S9cYbU9-dvAeT0FmSCDLlwY2onM50Cbof2eoGJoa3C0yh6ByAe3gj8vFi6ke7hbaYFc_QuysV_Ub8usea8PG4AE-CiU3NGM2I7KRqmXIN3JVOBubujLyo05RKT8MiemHidSTilxHrMoTiR2-UBh-33DIp5QiW92Jpb6x1QDwb76KFy2m09dO-Beh7zNj7UHBTQdZxUMkRk0lc%3D)**

Fellow patriot,

We send emails to you regularly, but from the tepid response we’re getting**_we’re now wondering if you’re aware of how absolutely dangerous President Biden and Senate Democrats truly are_**.

We tried to warn you last year that Biden was a Trojan Horse,**a façade for socialism**. Biden isn’t a moderate – no matter what he says or what the media tells you. The truth of the matter is that he goes along to get along – and that means bending to the will of what’s popular in the Democrat Party at any given moment.

**[Do you have a few moments today to take our Socialism in America Survey today to offer your thoughts on this disastrous ideology the far-left Democrats are attempting to force on all of us?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9656a7bff6f1443ca65179b343b2f7dd&_e=3QfCt6PCMXoRA0U80SOPMy1DMGfCDU2DcMkA-B7kXJS-7EZEXBWA47un5viaCR_jXbUS_L8nEzdosunounV7yH7OIKgWz_jXKDQPjSQKu9oqku6UQI-4p-CtiFrZxQfZENYvV36c8WzREf1uekUY4KuCC4Z76-Gfj3FAFvn1M1bfezBx0MvsyTE9BcP-JjYXW733uJWbVNot6pQ-AIvLWcmtnq6eUkGvDaRX7S8EJFhsCNN31qnX36ocIc3xf3KSFL9lJKezIxaWVRgGo6yC-J7ns5kmqNtAJ3XUl5u2MilXhp16QRVyoUgOIIC2x_JQC4_ccZ8ezCUnTXbRRdYEDSiqnVi1JdvQ1K5V0PAXqKxVW5q7W-KkzljarR_C4JvU5q0mHgGiAZpMmOXKjR_LW85MSEEGSjAs4X2uFOmVyk78fs6bvjB3RJOQyFtyW3Ob03k3Y9N6UAVbFmpfPkwIFPMzOQKotBzmOtOFp5dnvg0%3D)**

Right now, the base of the Democrat Party supports socialism. As a result, President Biden is perfectly fine spending trillions of dollars in what the White House and Senate Democrats deem “human infrastructure.”

The reality of the situation, however, is that Chuck Schumer knows that if he doesn’t at least try to bring European style socialism to the United States, **AOC is going to launch a campaign for his Senate seat**.

**As for Biden, he made a deal with the Devil the day he accepted Bernie Sanders’ endorsement**.

President Biden claims that his $3.5 Trillion “Build Back Better” bill is “overwhelmingly popular” with the American people. We want to know if that’s true.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY TODAY**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9656a7bff6f1443ca65179b343b2f7dd&_e=3QfCt6PCMXoRA0U80SOPMy1DMGfCDU2DcMkA-B7kXJS-7EZEXBWA47un5viaCR_jXbUS_L8nEzdosunounV7yH7OIKgWz_jXKDQPjSQKu9oqku6UQI-4p-CtiFrZxQfZENYvV36c8WzREf1uekUY4KuCC4Z76-Gfj3FAFvn1M1bfezBx0MvsyTE9BcP-JjYXW733uJWbVNot6pQ-AIvLWcmtnq6eUkGvDaRX7S8EJFhsCNN31qnX36ocIc3xf3KSFL9lJKezIxaWVRgGo6yC-E_P5EimUMoGcsCLeZwK_tr4lhJFbZgq50MHE9e0xGfFKlliyWzP-39sfsejH3s3qrria3WGAu4nHzJAzApOQtBrouSBBETgVm8SDmqjnlJWTNI7Zy5VqIgAoKcVEM5DUAO7t_S4Gw4H2k7UlVhB9WCWTDIguc7n-gs18MYwlxY6BFs6NhiFJ7FjgzdnuzredmKFLJ0WG35NsgcgGW1JdVg%3D)

Please don’t ignore this email – there is too much at stake to delete this without responding.

**We warned you and every American that we could reach during last year’s election that there would be extreme consequences if we all didn’t do our part to keep the White House and the Senate Republican.**

_**Well, the roosters are coming home to roost**_.

We’re quite literally staring down the prospect of living in a socialist nation. If we don’t wake up from our slumber soon, America as we know it is going to be gone forever.

**[Please take 30 seconds out of your day to answer our 5 questions survey right now. It’s critical we know where you stand.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9656a7bff6f1443ca65179b343b2f7dd&_e=3QfCt6PCMXoRA0U80SOPMy1DMGfCDU2DcMkA-B7kXJS-7EZEXBWA47un5viaCR_jXbUS_L8nEzdosunounV7yH7OIKgWz_jXKDQPjSQKu9oqku6UQI-4p-CtiFrZxQfZENYvV36c8WzREf1uekUY4KuCC4Z76-Gfj3FAFvn1M1bfezBx0MvsyTE9BcP-JjYXW733uJWbVNot6pQ-AIvLWcmtnq6eUkGvDaRX7S8EJFhsCNN31qnX36ocIc3xf3KSFL9lJKezIxaWVRgGo6yC-IDoMERp7GcubQ6XUZMsNvlsKnxxVbiqaP6OK94G3Qbl0F4LF2iYv7bv4jPgJ0xxWChDS8uTZaBaX7foFNBrq8PUjEQURdEOwHe8bqdC9QjoTWMcWqU8OkxkyYwmvGgjvdghlC_kBm1IWbVdg2RNzvhQwaIAWujRxsM81yTzUzcHsf-NGKTaXgEWcc426qLLBAUg4wfYAAZb85hS6xpjbas%3D) **

Senate Republicans **Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too.**

clean_body: | SURVEY REQUEST: It’s obvious: Democrats can no longer hide the fact they’re embracing socialism. Fellow patriot, We send emails to you regularly, but from the tepid response we’re gettingwe’re now wondering if you’re aware of how absolutely dangerous President Biden and Senate Democrats truly are. We tried to warn you last year that Biden was a Trojan Horse,a façade for socialism. Biden isn’t a moderate – no matter what he says or what the media tells you. The truth of the matter is that he goes along to get along – and that means bending to the will of what’s popular in the Democrat Party at any given moment. Right now, the base of the Democrat Party supports socialism. As a result, President Biden is perfectly fine spending trillions of dollars in what the White House and Senate Democrats deem “human infrastructure.” The reality of the situation, however, is that Chuck Schumer knows that if he doesn’t at least try to bring European style socialism to the United States, AOC is going to launch a campaign for his Senate seat. As for Biden, he made a deal with the Devil the day he accepted Bernie Sanders’ endorsement. President Biden claims that his $3.5 Trillion “Build Back Better” bill is “overwhelmingly popular” with the American people. We want to know if that’s true. Please don’t ignore this email – there is too much at stake to delete this without responding. We warned you and every American that we could reach during last year’s election that there would be extreme consequences if we all didn’t do our part to keep the White House and the Senate Republican. Well, the roosters are coming home to roost. We’re quite literally staring down the prospect of living in a socialist nation. If we don’t wake up from our slumber soon, America as we know it is going to be gone forever. Senate Republicans Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too. Failure is simply not an option. The voters need to know their elected officials are not who they pretend to be. subject: How Did It Actually Get Worse??
body:
Visit our website [https://eliforsenate.com/]

The Biden Administration's foreign policy has been absolutely catastrophic. Everyday it gets worse, and it’s only year one.

Not only did the Biden Administration abandon hundreds of Americans in Afghanistan, we just learned that they botched a drone strike that killed ten civilians, including seven children.

This administration’s negligence is gross and dangerous. We need to take a stand. Are you with me? [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=How+Did+It+Actually+Get+Worse%3F%3F]

body:
Sign your name to wish Barack and Michelle a happy anniversary!
| | | ****[Sign your name to wish Barack and Michelle a happy anniversary!](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_4k~)
Democratic HQ is feeling the love today.

**Two of our most beloved Democrats -- Barack and Michelle Obama -- just celebrated their 29th wedding anniversary!**

So to commemorate their marriage and all they've done for our country, we're asking our BEST grassroots Democrats to sign their card before midnight:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/8E0Gs0wL8-)
We want to show how PROUD we are to have Barack and Michelle fighting for us on so many important issues.

So we're calling on their best supporters to sign their anniversary card before midnight tonight.

Will you help us make Barack and Michelle's anniversary their most memorable yet?
[QUICKLY: Add your name before midnight to wish Barack and Michelle a happy anniversary!](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/qkxpQe_)
Thank you,

DCCC

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

clean_body: | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to beat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. Greene is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: Biden Blows off Illinois
body:
Biden decided to skip his trip to Illinois last week where he would have been met with my messages about his lackluster performance

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=2) Dear Peter -- Joe Biden cancelled his trip to Illinois this week, but had he shown up, my message to him would have been to stop putting woke politics ahead of the good of the country. Biden’s reckless spending spree is driving us deeper into debt and jeopardizing the future of our country. It is time we prioritized working families over the political agenda of the woke left. But Biden is not the only one who needs to hear that message. JB Pritzker needs to hear it too. The problems we are seeing at the national level are the same problems we have here in Illinois. Our Governor, like Biden, is not focused on the essentials. Our state is in shambles, but Pritzker is standing on the sidelines rather than leading. We have no plan for how to create more jobs, lower taxes and protect Illinois families. We can’t afford more of the same in Illinois. I hope you will join me in making JB Pritzker a one-term Governor. Log onto [https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=3) today and learn how. Best Regards, Gary Rabine | |
---|---
|
##
### St. Charles Bonfire & Barbecue Meet & Greet \- St. Charles (10/16) 7 PM - 10 PM
Come out on the 16th for a meet & greet with Gary at this bonfire and barbecue! This will be a fun filled night that offers supporters a chance to come talk to Gary one on one. To RSVP for this event and for more information visit the Facebook event page linked below.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOV60X97eBVNlQDDrdl35Xe1&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=4 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOV60X97eBVNlQDDrdl35Xe1&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=4)
---
* * *
##
### **Turning Point Action’s Charlie Kirk endorses Gary Rabine for Governor**
"I am supporting Gary Rabine for Governor because he is the best candidate and the one I know can beat JB Pritzker and as importantly, turn our state around. Gary is a dear friend who has always been there to help me, and I believe firmly in backing my friends. Gary will be a terrific Governor and has my total endorsement.” -Charlie Kirk
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_4_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=5 "Continue Reading") [Continue Reading](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_4_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=5)
---
### **Gary Rabine: Pritzker again fails to keep his word on legislative redistricting**
“The Governor went back on his word when he signed into law the Legislature’s partisan map earlier this year. The Legislature had to redraw the maps based on new Census data. Instead of insisting on a fair remap process, the Governor again went back on his word and signed the map into law.”
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_4_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=6 "Read More Here") [Read More Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_4_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=6)
---
### **Debt burden in Illinois grows**
The debt burden for each Illinois taxpayer has grown from $30,000 in 2009 to $57,000 today. Only two other states have a higher debt burden than Illinois. In New Jersey, taxpayers are on the hook for $58,300 while Connecticut’s debt burden is $62,500 for each taxpayer.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_4_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=7 "Continue Reading") [Continue Reading](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/newsletter_10_4_updates?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=7)
---
* * *
## [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=8)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=9)
---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=10)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/join?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=11)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=12).
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6t84VcLDAztZ7gNMCtVnC4HtpWQk6Xt7pTvj7avz1DYf&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=13) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3owDXItF8Fxepzm0P3FcLQliFyUmYOOEoz3DQt6cVpu&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=14) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TpvcEbp0GzIdVh11H7oShmM&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_10_4&n=15)
Thank you and God bless.

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: how did they even get there?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**ALERT: OUR BORDER IS OVERWHELMED!** It's time to secure our border and put an end to Biden's immigration crisis. **[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r) ** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r) | |
---
Peter, President Biden has turned immigration into a humanitarian crisis.

For months, we've faced a record number of undocumented migrants flooding our southern border from all over Mexico and central America.

Now, somehow, we've got thousands of Haitian refugees attempting to come in through Texas. _(You 've seen the pictures, I'm sure.)_

❌ No one is asking HOW these migrants got to our border.
❌ No one is reporting the reason they came through Mexico is BECAUSE of Biden's open border policies.
❌ And no one is being clear about where we draw the line on Biden's disastrous immigration policies.

**I 'm drawing the line NOW. **If we don't, it's never going to stop. And today, I want you to join me in demanding we secure our border and hold Biden accountable.
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r)
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r)
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $65**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r)
[**SECURE THE BORDER: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r)
Peter, Biden's border failures are too great to ignore.
* He's dismantled Trump-era policies that protected our country.
* He's encouraged sanctuary cities.
* He continues to invite millions into our country, despite the fact that all authorities have said they are overwhelmed and cannot properly track the influx of individuals.

It's a complete disaster. And without us demanding better, there'd be no end in sight.****

**[I AGREE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r) **

President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the mainstream media will continue to operate as if this enormous burden on our country doesn't even exist.

**But I won't.**

We must protect America first, and to do that we're going to have to stand together to reject this destructive open-borders agenda.

[**Please chip in today to join the fight.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468549:JDeKcG2VN:m:1:3253819041:3633DB6107099E6CADE601AF7B5AACCB:r)

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
---

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Your support can change lives
body:
Peter, The month of September was difficult for Hoosier Democrats. Indiana Republicans manipulated the redistricting process with unfair districts that will continue to harm the future of Indiana and Hoosier families. They will vote "NO" on the popular and bipartisan infrastructure deal. They are not doing anything in the fight against COVID-19, and now some Indiana hospitals now have to use the Indiana National Guard to handle the fallout. [**Help us to recruit and train the candidates needed to be able to vote them out by contributing $24, or whatever you can, today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37045424/309906690/624230061?refcode=FR.10.06.21.&amount=24&FR.10.06.21.=FR.10.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdlOGMxNC1jMzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGzX9LWBFU8rLvVgGmxTn3OrXXQckAugU2v_ds7n4L8=) I'm afraid our state can't take much more of this. I'm worried about the amount of Hoosiers we could lose to COVID-19, following Indiana hitting the grim milestone of 15,000 deaths during the pandemic. I'm worried about the Republicans' partisan attacks against the state's public education system. And I'm terrified of women losing their access to reproductive health care. Peter, we have to build a strong grassroots coalition that will take the fight to the INGOP in the 2022 election. The ONLY way we're going to stop them from destroying our state is to start organizing for 2022 now. [**Read about Project Rebuild, our plan to reorganize the Party and start the grassroots coalition for 2022 NOW.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37045425/309906691/624230061?refcode=FR.10.06.21.&FR.10.06.21.=FR.10.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdlOGMxNC1jMzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGzX9LWBFU8rLvVgGmxTn3OrXXQckAugU2v_ds7n4L8=) This time of year is critical for finding candidates to run against Republican incumbents. Once the redistricting process is complete we need to hit the ground running. So, we've set a goal to raise $5,000 by October 15th at MIDNIGHT. [**Peter, will you chip in $3, or whatever you can, to help us reach our goal? We're relying on grassroots donors like you to help us get to work in October.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37045426/309906692/624230061?refcode=FR.10.06.21.&amount=3&FR.10.06.21.=FR.10.06.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDdlOGMxNC1jMzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGzX9LWBFU8rLvVgGmxTn3OrXXQckAugU2v_ds7n4L8=) name: Joe Biden
subject: It starts with Terry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37046488/309908471/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.1_JB_10AF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjM5MjQzNC1jNzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVjiXolRdEjpaWV5qZXR4PiGjVC0ZDtdaOdVjzDw2lk=)

| | Derek, Terry McAuliffe and I go back a long way and, let me tell you, you’re not going to find anyone who knows how to get more done for Virginia than him.

We don’t have to wonder what kind of governor Terry will be, we already know. He was a great governor for Virginia before, and he will be once again with your support.

_**[Will you join me in supporting Terry by rushing a donation to his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37046489/309908472/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.1_JB_10AF&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjM5MjQzNC1jNzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVjiXolRdEjpaWV5qZXR4PiGjVC0ZDtdaOdVjzDw2lk=)**_

Folks, the Virginia Governor’s race is a big deal not just for the Commonwealth but for our country.

Here’s why:

Terry is running against an acolyte of Donald Trump. And like Trump and so many in the Republican Party right now, Terry’s opponent is offering nothing but fear, lies and broken promises.

Folks, that’s not good enough, and it’s critical that we keep standing together to deliver that message.

Because you stood with me in 2020, I beat Donald Trump. Come November, we’ll beat Trump again, but only if you work just as hard for Terry as you did for me.

Virginia, in the battle for the soul of America, democracy prevailed. The Constitution held. We have to do it again and keep doing it.

Fifty years from now, our children and grandchildren will look back and know that it was at this moment America won the 21st century again.

And it starts now. Virginia, it starts with Terry. It starts with you, Derek.

_**[Please, will you contribute anything you can afford right now and help Terry McAuliffe win this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37046490/309908473/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.1_JB_10AF&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjM5MjQzNC1jNzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVjiXolRdEjpaWV5qZXR4PiGjVC0ZDtdaOdVjzDw2lk=)**_

Thank you,

Joe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37046491/309908474/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.1_JB_10AF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjM5MjQzNC1jNzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SVjiXolRdEjpaWV5qZXR4PiGjVC0ZDtdaOdVjzDw2lk=)**

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zguvpfh0mcqrmlup8s8uorvko4dnjsd4c9bnh8t8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9cj7c5imfchicpq74sr2mpqn2slge5jb2c3gscqn1d3jc8p64sb4m4p30sbkmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eapmcdb2mdj3fchhcopb1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpj62pj6c5i69oh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6o9feklac2ab65bn6g1ioh2qvbha7sa1lv1kb30_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5j6cob4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zenl435n7j53gk19ur7oqnmaf3ccu677or1a3q68_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5j6cob4cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ogta23sd7f29702acsjqv5dpae947lpom98460_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5j6cob4cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Peter,

Will you join President Trump by standing with Team Herschel today? **[Every dollar will help us build a winning campaign, so whatever you can give will make a big difference.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58468717:J75Z9G2CN:m:1:3253819041:7EF9907DFB7678159CA64B0C2A7A7751:r)**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

subject: Costs $0
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "Headline") Peter, Inflation is rising at rates not seen since the Jimmy Carter Administration, and it is only matched by the crime rate. **The Dow Jones is tanking, and home prices are rising.** Joe Biden's solution? The Build Back Better Act - a massive government giveaway of your money that will increase the national debt by $4.5 Trillion and KILL 3.5 MILLION AMERICAN JOBS. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "Money")**He is going to give away YOUR money to his cronies and kill your job in the process.** We cannot allow this to happen. Joe Biden's vision for America is one in which you are utterly dependent on his government to live. That isn't the America I want to leave my children or your children. **I am going to stand and FIGHT.[I need to know if you will help me keep fighting and donate as much as possible so we can stop him.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "I need to know if you will help me keep fighting and donate as much
as possible so we can stop him.")** It's either invest in our future now or pay Joe more in taxes tomorrow. And let's face reality, we cannot give Joe Biden an INCH in this fight. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "Headline")He is already making a full court press in the media, peddling the old lie that this massive spending plan somehow **" costs zero dollars."** If you don't remember, that is the same lie they told us about Obamacare. _I didn 't fall for it then, and I am not going to fall for it now._ **_No more lies._** I will not stop fighting, and I will not allow them to lie to us anymore. I will fight their lies and socialist agenda at every turn, even if it causes me to lose friends in Washington, because I'm here to serve the American people, not the special interests. I have stood against them long enough to know what they will do - **[they will come after my family and me, and I need to have your continued support so I can keep fighting back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "they will come after my family and me, and I need to have your
continued support so I can keep fighting back.")** **Please, your donation will go a long way in our fight to restore our nation to greatness and pull us back from Biden 's socialist plan.** The fight to take back our nation and restore America's greatness will be long, and it will be difficult. **[Are you willing to stand with me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "Are you willing to stand with me?")** I need to know now. Join me,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58470086:JItCXG2SN:m:1:3103520637:C5E047ACBB1F86D06716EDCD1A0D6D08:r "STAND WITH JOSH")

name: Defend the Senate
subject: Tough battles ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37056114/309938612/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhkZDJkYy1lMjI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FbeFM2xrGhgqOWHTxcdH_qPUVOXPiujwU-2OzFrzR1k=)
Friends — Flipping Arizona’s Senate seat last year was an uphill battle, but grassroots supporters like you came through to help win this race for Senator Mark Kelly. [**Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party are already going after vulnerable Democrats like Mark Kelly, so we need to fight back. | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2021 WHERE'S LUCY? MCBATH DODGES QUESTIONS ON SUPPORT FOR TRILLION-DOLLAR DEM BOONDOGGLE ATLANTA - In a desperate attempt to avoid answering for her radical agenda, Congresswoman Lucy McBath spent the weekend dodging questions about her support for Nancy Pelosi's trillion-dollar spending package. While every other Georgia Democrat proudly asserted their approval of the boondoggle, which is the largest in U.S. history, Lucy repeatedly declined to go on the record about her planned vote for the legislation, which will both fund a grab bag of socialist policies and increase taxes on Georgia families. As the Atlanta Journal Constitution [reports](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xRQx_MK70NHMU3kWaRq43NaM1OgJHdVnob_eLxOseXUuim15MztfmPAcA1GG8WfAU7RUZts7M3WN6-kVsFkjitMdm-OfWUdbHzN_DJcy__-IiWxAFurm6Zi4xLz9trJmOOuyM688ZovWOYji7fnrL4R6daAXqfTtgML56-x6pUjcA_g8lP0AKMRMTtOrwr1RdXXRT6bb4a2AgAs1VPZZkxeo1zid4yCpmKi_p_lpbxq8Uev6Tw-vZLTLJ2G3M9ptlCS420Px9whPLhMAW1WQogtY8i27c2anDaQ8w4NhitY=&c=RdwQdKt7xg52h7UpUGpdU-4SOrgNt-T9A21ArEg7zaQMkbjtTScLdg==&ch=KEykBIVFFJLmOHT80tQUch6g-9EqXgfpxOkTDMSeLEEcmZMviePV-g==): "The only Georgia Democrat who didn't weigh in is Rep. Every position she takes will be used by Republican opponents hoping to knock her out of her swing suburban Atlanta district, which could become even more conservative after redistricting." "Even Lucy McBath knows that her far-Left politics are too radical for her district - which is why she's dodging questions about her support for Nancy Pelosi's trillion-dollar boondoggle," said Meagan Hanson, conservative candidate for Georgia's 6th Congressional District. "The people of Georgia's 6th Congressional District deserve an answer. It's time for Lucy to stop hiding behind Nancy Pelosi's coattails."

name: Dr. Douglas Lowell
subject: An Illegal immigrant kidnapped my elderly parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUGLAS LOWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, My family's ranch near the southern border tells a story. It is more than familial history... Unfortunately, it also tells tales of illegal immigration, rape, abduction and murder. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have conducted a coordinated effort, along with their radical cronies and media allies, to IGNORE the crisis they created at the southern border, and open the flood gates to illegal immigrants and violent criminals. [**DEMAND BORDER SECURITY NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58471521:JKkpeG2eN:m:1:3253819041:2DC9F97C40001FC532EC6C3BBBBB75C1:r) On my family's ranch, we found what is unfortunately known as a "rape tree." The tree is "decorated" with women's underwear like ornaments by cartel coyotes, who smuggled these women onto our ranch and into America, sexually assaulting them along the way. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58471521:JKkpeG2eN:m:1:3253819041:2DC9F97C40001FC532EC6C3BBBBB75C1:r) The violence does not stop there. **This is personal for me**. An illegal immigrant **ABDUCTED** my elderly parents. He stole their car, put them inside, and dumped them in a parking lot near the border with Mexico. [**STOP THE INFLUX OF VIOLENT ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58471521:JKkpeG2eN:m:1:3253819041:2DC9F97C40001FC532EC6C3BBBBB75C1:r) What is most unfortunate is that these anecdotes are not unique to my family. Violent illegal immigrants and cartel coyotes are wreaking havoc in communities all along the Southern Border, and throughout America. **I 'm running for Congress because I have seen ENOUGH of Joe Biden's inaction and failed attempt at leadership. ** **[Will you join me in this fight for border security with a contribution of $25, $50, or even $100 NOW? >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58471521:JKkpeG2eN:m:1:3253819041:2DC9F97C40001FC532EC6C3BBBBB75C1:r)** This fight is not just about my ranch. This fight is about the future of America. I REFUSE to allow America to fall to violent cartels and gangs. name: Andy Beshear
subject: The first of many thank yous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I'm blown away. Since announcing our re-election campaign, folks from across the Commonwealth have stepped up to the plate to support us, and I couldn't be more grateful. I'm blown away, Peter.

Since announcing our re-election campaign, folks from across the Commonwealth have stepped up to the plate to support us, and I couldn't be more grateful.

The 2023 race for governor will be one of the most important in the whole country. It'll be a bellwether of our values and define the future of Kentucky. It's likely that outside money will flood our Commonwealth again, just as it did last time around, to try and undo all of the progress we've made. So I mean it when I say your early support goes a long way for this campaign.

The fight to recover from COVID-19, get people back to work in jobs that pay living wages, invest in our education system, and support Kentucky families is ongoing. Folks are counting on us to deliver, and I won't let them down. We're taking steps now to lay the groundwork for another winning campaign, and we need your help. **[I'm counting on your support to help us cut through the noise and reach folks across the Commonwealth to earn their support once again. Fighting for the kitchen table issues we all care about -- like supporting public education, protecting pensions, and expanding Medicaid -- has been the cornerstone of my life in public service. Advancing these issues and recovering from the COVID-19 pandemic will be tough but necessary to build a Commonwealth where all can live and thrive.

We won the governor's office by just 5,136 votes last time around. We knocked on hundreds of thousands of doors and spoke with thousands of Kentuckians. The race was hard, it was expensive, but ultimately it was successful because of your support.

We're ready to build another winning campaign and talk to every Kentuckian we can about their priorities -- but I'm going to need your help to start right now.

**[Can I count on you to make an early investment in our re-election campaign so we can continue fighting for Kentucky values in Frankfort?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37060449/309955079/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211004_L3GMO_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211004_L3GMO_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTgwNGEzOS1lYzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p6BVH0kYxp3Bs3J4dd5okycDDNd9nQjuPC28e0HblwM=)**

Thank you,

Andy

Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37060450/309955080/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211004_L3GMO_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211004_L3GMO_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTgwNGEzOS1lYzI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p6BVH0kYxp3Bs3J4dd5okycDDNd9nQjuPC28e0HblwM=)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Government-run medicine is slavery
body:
The government now claims to have full control over our healthcare system and our lives. This is a dangerous precedent.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrgnd8f9oqvkcmdbflp9hve7t54fmcrgbsropfh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5gm6o34c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhm1jr8dhgchj36dlgcmpm8shm6gpj2c70shjr5d5n68qrfdj465qm1crmc6pneduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cr66ljjbcr7mpgmcdj0m9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zom206t3cenelmko9gr1kusfv3n2t3elsccpp4cg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5gm6o34c3h2bs)

Friend,

A government big enough to control your medical services is a government big enough to control your life. You become a serf to the state.

Here's the slippery slope we've arrived at in the United States:
* Extensive lockdowns last year **destroyed small businesses**.
* Fauci is allowed to **dictate vaccines** on federal workers.
* Biden is **limiting monoclonal antibodies** to Republican states.

The government now claims to have full control over our healthcare system and our lives. This is a dangerous precedent.

But one organization has been fighting against the mandates since the beginning - **Foundation for Economic Education (FEE)**. _FEE is the main reason a new generation of high school and college students believe in liberty and are fighting back against the mandates_.

[**FEE now requires our support to expand FEE in the Classroom to more high school students. I am giving my word and helping to raise $50,000 online. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $100, or more to FEE?

Donate $10 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3gictuutm3h58jfg00clraif97uqrdrn4rf47e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5gm6o34c3h2bs)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl52j42ps705lopa8io1a5jbjb2kinak0rkl9bmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5gm6o34c3h2bs)

FEE in the Classroom workshops educate and inspire high school and college students on the core ideas and principles of free enterprise, limited government, entrepreneurship, and strong personal character--right in their classrooms where the Left has dominated for decades.

Future generations will look back at this time as a dark period of government abuse.

And I know FEE will be responsible for changing the hearts and minds of future generations towards liberty.

[**Please click here to support FEE in the Classroom with a donation of $35 or more >>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb9n3ribb0ooe60pvk4e5ch1vequ5o9h5ahkgo1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5gm6o34c3h2bs)

Decades ago when I was a high school student, it was FEE who first introduced me to economics and the philosophy of limited government. Fast forward many years, FEE is still the leading organization introducing kids to freedom.

**FEE helped us defeat the ideas of communism long ago by equipping students with the works of Milton Friedman, FA Hayek, and Henry Hazlitt, and many others. **

We may have defeated the Soviets, but big government apologists and socialists still push their agenda whenever and wherever they can.

There is no other organization I trust more than FEE to introduce economics to students. Please send your support today.

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zghulrjbi3petvuv0me87g92hht83u38goqftam8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5gm6o34c3h2bs)

_Now more than ever, parents are looking for alternatives to education_. FEE in the Classroom is the ideal program to give high school and college students lessons in personal responsibility, free markets, and limited government.

Thank you,

Rand Paul

clean_body: This is urgent | | | BREAKING news, Derek: Trump’s handpicked candidate just entered the race to defeat Sen. Raphael Warnock (D) and flip the Senate for Republicans! Derek, after CNN named Sen. Warnock one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats up for reelection, Mitch McConnell and his shady super PACs started flooding the airwaves with attack ads to smear Sen. Warnock’s record and turn Georgia red. Now, Trump’s handpicked candidate just officially entered the race – and a new poll shows us NECK-AND-NECK! Sen. Warnock is the moral warrior Democrats need to keep Georgia blue, defend our Senate majority and pass our progressive agenda. But with national Republicans already launching attack ads and mobilizing to defeat him, we need to fight back NOW, or we’ll risk falling dangerously behind. That's why we set a $50,000 fundraising goal to pull ahead, win this race and defend our Democratic Senate majority. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still falling WAY short. Thank you for chipping in when we need it most. More soon. – Team Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Endorsement Alert: Elect Democratic Women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Another major endorsement for Kirsten Engel's campaign for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37064747/309973202/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE4MzE0Yy1mNTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qt7RA82ANdGUJfCM4svajmtdW79CkToi-_-9UkvZef0=&emci=dde20585-6b25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=dba8314c-f525-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12898431)
---
Hello friend,
Today, I am honored to share with you that our campaign has been endorsed by** Elect Democratic Women**, an organization doing critical work to elect more women to Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37064749/309973203/558373307?refcode=X_100521_Endorsement_EDW&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE4MzE0Yy1mNTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qt7RA82ANdGUJfCM4svajmtdW79CkToi-_-9UkvZef0=)
---
Like so many Arizonans, I’ve had to balance work and parenting my entire career. The pandemic has only made this balance more challenging and women have borne the brunt -- both at home and in the workplace. We need more women at the table who can speak to those experiences.
Southern Arizona has a history of electing strong Democratic women, from Gabby Giffords to Ann Kirkpatrick. **I would be proud to carry on that tradition and use my experience as an environmental attorney, an educator, a legislator -- and a mom -- to make life better for our families.**
[**Will you help me build on this momentum by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37064750/309973206/558373307?refcode=X_100521_Endorsement_EDW&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE4MzE0Yy1mNTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qt7RA82ANdGUJfCM4svajmtdW79CkToi-_-9UkvZef0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37064751/309973207/558373307?refcode=X_100521_Endorsement_EDW&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE4MzE0Yy1mNTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qt7RA82ANdGUJfCM4svajmtdW79CkToi-_-9UkvZef0=)[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37064752/309973208/558373307?refcode=X_100521_Endorsement_EDW&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE4MzE0Yy1mNTI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qt7RA82ANdGUJfCM4svajmtdW79CkToi-_-9UkvZef0=)

Thank you for all you do,
Kirsten

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Senator Ted Cruz Endorsed my Run for Congress in TX-38!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Less than a week after I announced my campaign to run in Texas' 38th Congressional District, conservative leader Ted Cruz gave me his endorsement! I am extremely proud to have a like-minded conservative like Ted Cruz supporting my campaign. Please read his endorsement of me below!

"_I am proud to endorse Wesley Hunt to be my Congressman here in TX-38. Wesley is a combat veteran and a patriot and I’m confident that if elected to Congress he will continue fighting to defend our Constitution against the radical left. I know Wesley will stand with me to defend the unborn, protect the 2nd amendment and halt the flow of illegal aliens across our border. Wesley’s commitment to service and his values make him a great advocate for the people of the 38th district. I am proud to endorse Wesley and I urge conservatives in the 38th district to join me in supporting Wesley Hunt for Congress,"_ said Senator Ted Cruz.

We only need five seats to take back the house from Nancy Pelosi, and with your support and Senator Cruz's, I will fight to keep Critical Race Theory out of our schools, protect our southern border, secure our elections, and fight against Biden's $3.5 trillion tax and spending spree.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=6c7f9b85a76d427a98e01e1e7ceee7d6&_e=GwJQXp7eDGTgtgK9_EI2gHculvrg2GU-TAlkI7ogL0Ceu30zM-0jVe8kjkX1sCoeKn66_94w2V7QWuxCqYqy8Uae1E8Mz9wGXnIKODd9Q2B7Jvhzp6bEjF-iEnfDXiUxijHA1MhV94rx1vLpmhDicca69-38ZVff1NiwrMH4HX6DLtqWF_3lAmKA1upBc7p7ctzU2ju3vFNnAGnBcihFKB9lOvakTrRtI2n-rgQmHGR0t6vfp8cuHeww5FnO7jrPOZyukwNrM4XMSz6nBXeG20b6EKIWA5LNrjgf0kpG_cFiiBV3YCsblKOXFoPifVPWvlfLYLs6ZP0-OK3TzCSEP5YR1ip3JWcMHbaUw-zEXych-0xegkmGRM1WMXCTwqjh)****

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Politics isn't a TV show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
There’s a kid in a school today sitting in a classroom riddled with lead and mold
#

Hey folks,
When I say I'm running for working families like mine, here's why:
This very morning there is a parent who desperately wants to go back to work but can’t afford child care.
There’s a senior on a fixed income terrified they won’t have enough to cover their prescription medications.
There’s a kid in a school today sitting in a classroom riddled with lead and mold.
These anecdotes are grounded in a reality that I and so many working families know all too well.
Politics isn't a TV show — and policy isn't a game. Their impacts are real, and their outcomes are deadly serious.
Yet far too few of our elected officials know in their bones what families like yours and mine are going through.
So the solution is clear and simple: _If we want a government that works for working people, we must have more working people in government._
**If I have the honor of serving as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator, I'll fight like hell to make sure our needs are met, our voices are heard, and our people are present everywhere decisions about our lives are being made.**
[But I need you with me. If you're able to contribute even a little bit to the working people powered movement we're building, could you chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37066253/309978726/-360183459?refcode2=352d2fb7-f825-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211005-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTJkMmZiNy1mODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EsB9q0IshQ3EHE01BxXJUC_daUvW4biFqKxq6hhpD7w=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37066254/309978727/-360183459?refcode2=352d2fb7-f825-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211005-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTJkMmZiNy1mODI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EsB9q0IshQ3EHE01BxXJUC_daUvW4biFqKxq6hhpD7w=)**
Thanks for everything,
Malcolm

name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan=20Hess=2C=20Senior=20Advisor?=
subject: Virtual Volunteers Needed This Week!
body:
Voting is OFFICIALLY UNDERWAY! | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Hi ,

Voting in the 2021 Special Election is officially underway! We have just 28 days left to flip the 15th and send Allison to Congress. There is no time to wait, and we need all hands on deck to make this happen!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0d6c009096&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Text Voters about the first day of early voting!](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=522ec06ebb&e=400a181d5a)
We’re texting 2021 special election voters to let them know that early voting begins on Oct. 5th! With just a computer or smartphone, you can help us text voters in every corner of the district. No app or personal phone number required! We'll be on Zoom for camaraderie, troubleshooting, and discussing the special election!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c6e102db48&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Rural Voters for Allison Russo Phone Bank](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d84458d896&e=400a181d5a)
Make calls with Rural Voters for Russo and United Rural Democrats about the upcoming OH-15 special election! We have a mission: reach out to the folks who share our values in every corner of this district. Every Monday and Wednesday evening, we hold Zoom training sessions for first-time Russo phone bankers. Once you have gone through this training and have all the materials you'll need, you are welcome to make calls throughout the week, Monday-Friday from 4pm-8:30pm.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=55740e9e32&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Seniors for Allison Russo Phone Bank](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=364793dee3&e=400a181d5a)
Make calls with Seniors for Russo about the upcoming OH-15 special election! This phone bank targets senior voters who haven't yet made up their mind about the upcoming election. Every Tuesday and Thursday evening, we hold Zoom training sessions for first-time Russo phone bankers. Once you have gone through this training and have all the materials you'll need, you are welcome to make calls throughout the week, Monday-Friday from 4pm-8:30pm.

|
### _FEATURED IN-DISTRICT EVENTS THIS WEEK:_
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8a836abe76&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Ohio AFL-CIO Day of Action, Oct. 9th](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=708cd3dbc3&e=400a181d5a)
Join your brothers and sisters in the Ohio AFL-CIO for a district-wide Day of Action in support of Allison Russo! _All allies of labor welcome!_
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b059bd127c&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Knock on Doors with Mayor Nan Whaley](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b8c6e27e3f&e=400a181d5a)
Join us this Sunday, Oct. 10th at 11:30am to hear from special guest Mayor Nan Whaley to knock on doors and talk to our neighbors about the special election for Ohio’s 15th Congressional district.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b26518c28a&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [VMC Canvass with Mayor Steve Patterson](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=499adc120a&e=400a181d5a)
Join us this Sunday, Oct. 10th at 2pm to hear from Veteran and Athens Mayor Steve Patterson and fellow before we knock on doors and talk with voters on behalf of Allison Russo. _All allies welcome!_
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2e4d5630cd&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=90e52e3ad4&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"

RSVP: [Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=46cf759c2c&e=400a181d5a) | [Pickerington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=424b272425&e=400a181d5a) | [Hilliard](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=dac4604db2&e=400a181d5a) | [Lancaster](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5c6e1a0750&e=400a181d5a) | [Athens](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=33ad908e9a&e=400a181d5a) | [London](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=21ddbf4e78&e=400a181d5a) | [UA](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=490dc91da0&e=400a181d5a) | [Nelsonville](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b9f9304aba&e=400a181d5a) | [Grandview](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6dc61e5098&e=400a181d5a)
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d3785b021e&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")
---
| |
### _**We need you to help spread the word, .**_
_**Can you forward this email to ten neighbors, get a group of friends together to come to a meet and greet, or help us talk to voters soon?**_
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ddb8d50ae6&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=34b7263954&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=834177d060&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](AllisonRusso.com)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 RUSSO FOR CONGRESS, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or a campaign event.

**Our mailing address is:**
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=c4f16ab7b7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=c4f16ab7b7).

name: Kash Patel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
body:
True racism has always resided where you least expect it. I worked for President Donald Trump and I’m about as brown as you
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
---
| | | | | | | | | | [FIGHT WITH KASH in his battle against the fake news media](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhm5v6utlkglkm4mdlt89slhpeqshnp69vik1umo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)
---

Fellow Patriot,

True racism has always resided where you least expect it.

I worked for President Donald Trump and I’m about as brown as you can get. Not once did I experience racism from anyone in the Trump administration.

But every time my name is in the news I get bombarded with disgusting messages from rabid lunatics.

And that’s exactly what I’m facing now after Pelosi and the Dems slapped me with a subpoena to appear before their corrupt January 6th:

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0gecpf5ikv6kg2k5531j0dacj39s3oon9j22jig_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)

They have called me every slur in the book, consistently showing their true colors!

Clearly, they’re terrified of me!

They know that I don’t mess around and I’m coming after them.

**[I just launched a LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against the fake news media to help everyday Americans who’ve been smeared by the Democrat Fake News machine.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmkargokdmfsh7jqdl1qhlt6ifclj2o6n2qan8a0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)**

So, they have good reason to be afraid of me.

**[Will you help me send shivers down the spines of these left-wing smear merchants, by chipping in to support my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4e327bi9kaoipgde6s1a7i120c1vvsrrohsssfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu9vnp9623dosln25uektoa8tujrl9eh2640fn6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)

---

| | | [Chip in $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkk1uu662b757vtl6saag7vkmei0ecr9hh38tuig_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)
---

| | | [Chip in $75](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh77msbn63ho9b592oh690b3uknoams6oub31ma0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im4o37c9h2bs)

---

Together, you and I can and will crush these racists.

Thank you in advance for your generous support!

Yours in the fight for truth,

Kash Patel
Former Senior Trump Advisor

### Good Afternoon!
---
Happy Tuesday!I am blessed to have people like you who believe in the campaign and want change brought to Washington. My campaign has set a goal of raising $10,000 by October 31st. 10% of all donations will go toward charity. The specific charity will be announced toward the end of October. If you feel inclined to give, you can do so by clicking the donate button above or Venmo @AlveyforCongress. I would greatly appreciate your financial support.If you go to [https://www.andrewalvey.org/stances](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=615c83a4a30dfc2c8c35b7a9&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.andrewalvey.org%2Fstances%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D615ba5079cc079631b9ee995%26ss_email_id%3D615c83a4a30dfc2c8c35b7a9%26ss_campaign_name%3DA%2BHumble%2BRequest%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-10-05T16%253A56%253A35Z&w=609c0485dbf6602665aef372&l=en-US&s=lSn_yQIEDOOHrwgX6SBhLFXPwX4%3D) you can see detailed explanations for my stances on certain issues. This page will be added to in the coming weeks!Have a blessed week,Andrew Galatians 5:13Upcoming Events: October 23rd Lincoln GOP Brunch 10 a.m. October 23rd Oglethorpe GOP cookout 12:15 p.m. October 25th Oconee GOP Debate 7:00 p.m.

name: Team Franchot
subject: There’s still time to join us for our HQ Grand Opening!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
You still have time to join us for our Campaign HQ Grand Opening in Bowie. Peter Franchot will be speaking with voters about his vision for the future of our state. The event is this Saturday, October 9, so make sure you RSVP to let us know that you’re coming!
Click here to RSVP to join us on October 9. This will be an action-packed community day with free food, activities for kids, and live entertainment -- so make sure to bring your friends and family! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]Together, we have an opportunity to change the way that government does business in 2022. With your help, we’re going to secure 100,000 new jobs for our working families, make Maryland the renewable energy capital of the nation, build a statewide transit system, and so much more.
Our Campaign HQ Grand Opening will be held from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM at 4831 Tesla Drive, Bowie, MD 20715. The event is FREE, and everyone's invited! Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yFqVkZugUkezpiJ1p5JnWQ2]

| | I’ll be blunt, Derek. A recent poll shows a tied race and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.

**_[Early voting has already started. Can you donate before my deadline tomorrow and help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37070422/309986996/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.4_TM_10AI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWEzY2JhYy1mZDI1LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NNd2j3IhBHIKjIAyBNx6vJTKvTjULeJ-AwS6_NdmbI0=)_**

Like most campaigns, we use Facebook as part of our robust digital fundraising program. **But while Facebook was down yesterday, we lost that vital source of grassroots support.** As the digital director, I set daily fundraising benchmarks – and missing even one can cause us to fall behind our GOP opponents. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of October 4th: Out-of-Control Spending and DACA
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* Oppose the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) Program
* Out-of-Control Spending Cannot Continue

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**Oppose the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) Program
**
Remember when President Obama gloated that he had a “pen and a phone” and would circumvent Congress to grant amnesty to illegal immigrants who had arrived in the United States as minors? Even with the chaos on the border today, President Biden has decided to continue this illegal and unconstitutional program.

We have the chance to make our voice heard by filling out a simple form. We must make sure the Biden Administration hears from us!

**[Use this link to register your comment](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjc4LTI4ZGU4YTBkZDBjZjQ4NDg4MmU4MzA5ZDY1ZDI3ZTk0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmVkZXJhbHJlZ2lzdGVyLmdvdi9kb2N1bWVudHMvMjAyMS8wOS8yOC8yMDIxLTIwODk4L2RlZmVycmVkLWFjdGlvbi1mb3ItY2hpbGRob29kLWFycml2YWxzP21pZD00NDQwOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVEjb3Blbi1jb21tZW50&K=wLIsog5p5oIez6R34fiJJg) OPPOSING a new amnesty rule just proposed by the liberals in the Biden Administration.**

On Monday, September 27, Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas announced that the Department of Homeland Security would soon issue a notice of proposed rulemaking to “preserve and fortify” the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program, which was unlawfully established by President Barack Obama in June of 2012. The new notice of proposed rulemaking comes on the heels of a ruling earlier this year by a federal district judge who struck down the program because it was created unlawfully.

Essentially, the new rule is the same as the old rule. The only major difference is that the new rule is being noticed appropriately, with a provision for a 60-day public comment period. That public comment period will end on Monday, November 29.

We have until then to tell the Biden Administration why it would be wrong to reestablish this unlawful program.

Here are some points you might consider including in your comments:

* This is the program Barack Obama himself said he did not have the constitutional authority to establish – right before he chose to establish it anyway. In October 2010, he said, “I am not king. I can’t do these things just by myself.” In March 2011, he said that with “respect to the notion that I can just suspend deportations through executive order, that’s just not the case.” In May 2011, he acknowledged that he could not “just bypass Congress and change the law myself ... That’s not how a democracy works.” He was right.
* Only Congress, not the president, has the constitutional and legal authority to make immigration law. And not only did Congress not authorize the president to make such decisions, the Congress specifically rejected proposed legislation that would have done just that.
* DACA recipients are, by definition, illegal immigrants.
* DACA, which has been applied to more than 800,000 illegal immigrants, is a massive amnesty program.
* DACA is a direct violation of U.S. immigration law, which requires that people in this country illegally be apprehended and repatriated into their own country.

When you have entered your comments in the comment box on the website, copy and paste your comments into a new document that you can send to your two U.S. Senators and your U.S. Representative, to let all three of them know that you have commented on the proposed new rule.

Before hitting “SUBMIT COMMENT,” add to the end of your comment “I am sending a copy of my comment to my U.S. Senators, (fill in the name) and (fill in the name), and to my U.S. Representative (fill in the name).” Then send a copy of your comment to your elected officials, so you create an accountability loop.

Together, we can tell the Biden Administration that amnesty for illegal immigrants is wrong!
|
---
**Out-of-Control Spending Cannot Continue
**
For those who would like to keep track, the Democrats have had sole control of Washington, DC for just over eight months, and in that time, they have proposed spending roughly $11 trillion. This is an unprecedented level of spending – and it must stop.

In March, the Democrats passed the $1.9 trillion bailout for their preferred blue states and then came the $1 trillion infrastructure bill. Now we have the reconciliation bill, which Speaker Pelosi continues to say is $3.5 trillion. In reality, the bill comes in around $5 trillion or $5.5 trillion, according to the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget. All of this spending is on top of the $6 trillion budget for fiscal year 2022.

This is madness.

What’s even more maddening is that the Democrats have attempted to foist this new spending on us with almost zero consultation with Republicans in Congress.

The Democrats thought they could get away with this partisan spending blowout and then convince the Republicans to go along for the ride and vote for a rise in the debt ceiling.

It’s time for us to send a loud and clear message to the Republicans in Congress: Do NOT accommodate the Democrats’ reckless spending. Hold firm. Do not vote to raise the debt ceiling.

**Please call your two U.S. Senators today and urge them to stop the reckless spending.** If calling a Republican office, encourage the Senator to hold firm and not give in to the Democrats’ demands. If calling a Democrat’s office, please remind your Senator that it is immoral to saddle future generations with today’s out-of-control spending.

The Senate is in session this week, and they need to hear from us!
[FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjc4LTI4ZGU4YTBkZDBjZjQ4NDg4MmU4MzA5ZDY1ZDI3ZTk0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDQ0MDkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=S9HycYDSkJ2bsw1_h4DFZQ)
|
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjc4LTI4ZGU4YTBkZDBjZjQ4NDg4MmU4MzA5ZDY1ZDI3ZTk0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlP21pZD00NDQwOSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=nPUst6GdF3hKbe0PQtUi-w)
|
---

name: Eddie Geller
subject: No fundraising, just two things I think you’ll enjoy (seriously)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Because you’re here, you’re part of this campaign, and you deserve nice things. (Like a new Congressman in FL-15! But that’s not one of the things. Okay, three sentences is too long for a parenthetical...) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37073744/309990401/-1491242738?refcode=fl_em_na_20211005updates_EG_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRjY2Y0OC0wMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRrZg4ax_t7pwsJF3rjCvV3qgiekQOr6Mj381RmRx9Y=)
---
Friends, Two quick things I want to share with you, because you’re here, you’re part of this campaign, and you deserve nice things. (Like a new Congressman in FL-15! But that’s not one of the things. Okay, three sentences is too long for a parenthetical...) **First, we launched a new ad!** I guarantee you have never seen one like it — [take it all in here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37073745/309990402/-1491242738?refcode=fl_em_na_20211005updates_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRjY2Y0OC0wMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRrZg4ax_t7pwsJF3rjCvV3qgiekQOr6Mj381RmRx9Y=), then share it with your friends, your mom, and the grouchy barista at the café down the street. And if the barista is still grouchy after watching our ad then, in hindsight, maybe you shouldn’t have shown it to them during the morning rush. | [Watch the ad ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37073746/309990403/-1491242738?refcode=fl_em_na_20211005updates_EG_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRjY2Y0OC0wMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRrZg4ax_t7pwsJF3rjCvV3qgiekQOr6Mj381RmRx9Y=)
---
(By the way, my team wanted me to tweet “New campaign ad dropping today. Take a whiff!” when I announced this. You’ll understand when you watch it, but I’ll have you know that sometimes I’m the one reining things in.)
**Second, I was interviewed by my good friend Parker Molloy.** We had a wonderful conversation, but the most important thing you need to know is that it included me saying this sentence: “I was a 15-year-old young man looking for guidance, looking for a life, and, of course, the big mouse came calling.” [Listen to (or read) the rest of the interview here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37073747/309990404/-1092481678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRjY2Y0OC0wMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRrZg4ax_t7pwsJF3rjCvV3qgiekQOr6Mj381RmRx9Y=&emci=3d4ccf48-0126-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=424ccf48-0126-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12772398) if you, like almost everyone else, are dying to know my origin story.
That’s all for this one, folks. Thanks for coming along on the wild ride that is giving-a-shit-and-trying-to-make-the-world-a-better-place. I’m glad to have you on my team.
— Eddie

P.S. Parker has a great newsletter about all things news and communication which, in my humble opinion, is worth a read. [Check it out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37073748/309990405/1886307514?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRjY2Y0OC0wMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HRrZg4ax_t7pwsJF3rjCvV3qgiekQOr6Mj381RmRx9Y=&emci=3d4ccf48-0126-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=424ccf48-0126-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=12772398)

| Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process.
