name: ElectEducators
subject: Voting now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
body:
Educators Need Your Help

The Virginia elections end in 28 days, and every day, more and more voters are making up their minds and casting their ballots. We're in a sprint to reach them before it's too late. You can contribute here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-virginia

Adjunct Professor Debra Gardner
She's running a district decided by just 189 votes two years ago, and just 128 votes four years ago. The Koch brothers' organization has already spent $148,000 opposing her, but with our help now, she can defeat an anti-educator Republican.

1st Grade Teacher Kim Melnyk
Kim's a leader on the local school board, running to pick-up a GOP-held district that Democrats have won in each of the last 3 national and statewide elections.

3rd & 5th grade Teacher Kelly Fowler
Republicans have spent over $1.1 million trying to defeat Kelly in the last 4 years, and they are back again this year. Kelly's seat is key to holding the House - it was Joe Biden's 49th best seat in Virginia.

H.S. History Teacher Schuyler VanValkenburg
Schuyler is campaigning in the evenings and weekends while he continues to teach during the week. He's also survived over $1.1 million in Republican opposition in four years, flipping and holding a GOP seat.

Spanish Teacher Shelly Simonds
Shelly lost a tied election four years ago - after she and her GOP opponent got exactly the same number of votes, his name was drawn from a bowl. She came back and won that seat last time, and now she needs to defend it again this year.

Join us in helping these great candidates today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-virginia

Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. With your help, we can ensure that educators have a seat at the table when it comes to making policy decisions in this country.
Give Now ➞ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eee-gash-split?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210908ericgash_eee_180DO_xx_ftr]
https://www.facebook.com/ElectEducatorsEverywhere/ [https://www.facebook.com/ElectEducatorsEverywhere/] https://twitter.com/electeducators [https://twitter.com/electeducators] https://www.instagram.com/electeducatorseverywhere/ [https://www.instagram.com/electeducatorseverywhere/]
Paid for by Elect Educators Everywhere PAC
Contributions or gifts to Elect Educators Everywhere are not tax deductible. Your contribution will be deposited in Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account. Individuals and Federal PACs may contribute $5,000 per calendar year to Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account. Corporations, labor organizations, and other federally prohibited sources may not contribute to Elect Educators Everywhere’s Contribution Account.
Please click here if you are interested in making a contribution to Elect Educators Everywhere’s Non-Contribution Account, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/elect-educators-everywhere-1?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210731VAeom_EEE_150DO_xx_ftr2] or contact info@ElectEducatorsEverywhere.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/d114486a-0126-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/d714486a-0126-ec11-981f-501ac510a405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3MTQ0ODZhLTAxMjYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTEwYTQwNSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_qYXmGywI8sybztCwmtKDxLqVChzhz5AusBxNwJac0Y=&id=111673793 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Cori=20Bush=20via=20Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: We're in an eviction emergency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
** Justice Democrats
------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

We're in an eviction emergency. Right now, millions of families are at risk of being evicted from their homes because the right-wing Supreme Court blocked the eviction moratorium we helped win in August.

I refuse to just stand by and watch our government ignore this crisis — especially now with the rise of COVID cases in this ongoing pandemic. I've been evicted three times in my life. I remember the stress, fear, and anxiety of being unhoused, living in a car with my two babies. I refuse to let more families go through what I experienced.

That's why this fight is personal for me. That's why I was outside the Capitol for five days in August to demand a new eviction moratorium. And that's why last month, Senator Elizabeth Warren and I introduced the Keeping Renters Safe Act of 2021 with support from Justice Democrats to give the Department of Health and Human Services the permanent authority to implement eviction moratoriums during public health crises.

Will you add your name to co-sign the Keeping Renters Safe Act? It's urgent we take action especially now as COVID-19 surges in communities across our country. (https://evictionmoratoriumnow.com/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-evictionmoratorium21-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20211005-mc)

Add your name (https://evictionmoratoriumnow.com/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-evictionmoratorium21-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20211005-mc)

Here's how this all unfolded: In August, Members of Congress left for recess without extending the eviction moratorium. But I refused to accept that Congress could leave for vacation while 11 million people faced eviction.

So for the next five days, our progressive allies and I stayed outside of the Capitol to call on the Biden Administration to extend the eviction moratorium. Because of our collective activism, they finally took action.

https://evictionmoratoriumnow.com/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-evictionmoratorium21-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20211005-mc

But on August 26, the right-wing Supreme Court blocked our new moratorium leaving millions of people at imminent risk of losing their homes, stability, and safety.

If they thought this partisan ruling was going to stop us from fighting to keep people housed, they couldn't have been more wrong. I understand firsthand how high the stakes are in this fight and I refuse to rest until action is taken.

I will never forget the nights when I was unhoused where my eyes would water as I fought to stay awake, worried about what would happen to my children if I fell asleep. When I used McDonald's bathrooms to mix baby formula and wash my body because I had no other options. I don't want anybody to have to experience the suffering that I was forced to endure, especially not during a pandemic where the government's main focus should be on keeping people safe and healthy.

With the Delta variant rapidly spreading, Congress must act to offer protection to renters in the interest of public safety. People-power is the reason why we were able to win an eviction moratorium from the Biden Administration. Now, we need a strong showing of grassroots support to call on Congress to pass the Keeping Renters Safe Act.

Can Justice Democrats and I count on you to add your name and support action to keep millions of people in their homes during the COVID-19 pandemic? (https://evictionmoratoriumnow.com/?source=group-justice-democrats&referrer=group-justice-democrats&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-evictionmoratorium21-aa%3Frefcode%3Dem20211005-mc)

Thank you,

Cori Bush

Donate » (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em-mc-footer)

Paid for by Justice Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com (#) . If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe (https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=23f6e0d673&e=5a4b10d0ec&c=310e6770ae) . Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.

**We can’t cave in to his demands, Peter!**

In other words, Conor Lamb is someone who gets the job done. So while Sean Parnell's pathetic, negative video ads might try to make Conor look like a partisan politician, they don't stick -- they can't stick -- because Conor's reputation speaks for itself. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkjii4uuhlhk5onl6ne91c91kpb4ju2fa7lvijt0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im6o74c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaj8563s9unqg06bdiei7n83t7t6c9823ap9ajj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im6o74c9h2bs)**_ [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq4cac7ne58j07s62crpduqboq374l2asfcghpdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im6o74c9h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhvvpgieokuceod2irg98spot3176c6m7ermc9b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im6o74c9h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoj4gnm1klq9fvrgft320i2ket5lure128714gs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im6o74c9h2bs)**_
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqrv0uhkjb3jssvdgpt60j9u7ptuu7deqjnthrvo_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmjjuge7igpiq2v68octr1h9c02hf43cu5kerttg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5im6o74c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

We know we email you a lot, Peter. That’s because we rely on the support of Grassroots Republicans like you to sustain our efforts! The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us, and we can’t afford to let them win. The best way you can help is [1] by subscribing to our emails and text messages and [2] by chipping in a few dollars as often as you can. We appreciate you!
Text JOIN to 21011 to receive mobile alerts and help the NCGOP! Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&data rates may apply. Terms and Conditions at [21011-info.com](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=r6rcTiCaq6j7Lcgrzw4K17041lLwyHYaLS1Xg9Z7-WE&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=623914004781771396_1&n=16).
To contribute by mail, please send a check made payable to “North Carolina Republican Party” to:
North Carolina Republican Party, 1506 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27605, United States
**Contributions to North Carolina Republican Party are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes and may be used in connection with federal elections.**

clean_body: Here’s why... | We’re REALLY SORRY to keep emailing you, Peter. But here’s why: Last time, Far-Left Democrat Cheri Beasley raised more than $1.2 MILLION \-- and this quarter she’ll be even stronger! Sadly, it seems like this election will be even CLOSER and MORE EXPENSIVE than the 2020 campaign -- | | | | | When Democrat Cheri Beasley announced her numbers last quarter, more than 90% of her donations came from amounts of $100 or less. If we’re going to win this campaign, we need to match that Grassroots Energy -- not fall behind! Thank you. NCGOP HQ

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37082441/310004714/1047443242?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20211005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QyMWFlNC0wZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo8OwmaxnDOXvspA3lGt-rnoyAInk18R7QcOgzePtr8=&emci=23d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=27d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=252045) Folks, Martin suggested I reach out and, in a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to sign up for updates](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37082442/310004715/1047443242?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20211005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QyMWFlNC0wZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo8OwmaxnDOXvspA3lGt-rnoyAInk18R7QcOgzePtr8=&emci=23d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=27d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=252045)** on my campaign to represent New Mexico’s 2nd District in the U.S. House of Representatives. But first, I want to share a bit about why I’m running. New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District is my home and I’ve seen firsthand the challenges that our communities face, but I’ve also seen a multitude of untapped opportunities. I have seen both the struggle and the beauty of southern New Mexico, and I’m determined to do everything possible to see our families succeed. That requires leadership, innovation and dedication. **It’s why I decided to jump into the race for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District.** It’s time for New Mexico’s 2nd District to have a new representative — one who will fight hard for economic justice, affordable housing, equal pay for equal work, high-quality healthcare for all, and so much more. I’m ready to build on our momentum in New Mexico after President Biden defeated Donald Trump. But the GOP is also doing everything in their power for my Republican opponent. With our slim Democratic majority in the House, it’s more important than ever to flip this red seat back to blue. Democrats have taken this seat before, and we can take it back now. [**I know it’s going to be an uphill battle, but I’m prepared to take on this fight with the support of a people-powered campaign behind me. Will you sign up today to receive updates from my campaign? I’m counting on your grassroots support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37082443/310004716/1047443242?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20211005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QyMWFlNC0wZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo8OwmaxnDOXvspA3lGt-rnoyAInk18R7QcOgzePtr8=&emci=23d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=27d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=252045) | [SIGN UP NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37082444/310004717/1047443242?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20211005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QyMWFlNC0wZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo8OwmaxnDOXvspA3lGt-rnoyAInk18R7QcOgzePtr8=&emci=23d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=27d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=252045)
---
As City Councilor, I worked hard to deliver real results that both benefited my constituents and brought them together. I promise to bring the same work ethic to the House, where I will always put the best interests of my constituents first.
We’ve got a long journey ahead of us, but it’s exactly what this powerful and resilient grassroots team is ready for. **[Please sign up to be a part of our team by adding your name to our email updates list.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37082445/310004718/1047443242?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_PET_AC_20211005_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2QyMWFlNC0wZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo8OwmaxnDOXvspA3lGt-rnoyAInk18R7QcOgzePtr8=&emci=23d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=27d21ae4-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=252045)**
Thanks for standing with me.
Gabe Vasquez
Democratic Candidate
New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

body:
While Democrats focus on driving up the national debt, Representative Gallagher has been playing a key role in holding military leaders accountable... [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f2a1c28a39fc465bb6e9f278bf890fed&_e=1cWzOJQ27K-Q66ZNML3fY2JbKiBrXM_CnwahCqJfDJZjS-Gu68bVCOvtFf9IXlFxepaPi-j166N4eAaL9_LkhXAbTEvf4gIHbMaV26OCF2lhLo2aEGRq71uEc9wzZL3slu1POa4zaEelIviKDuiR-sOEuTUKM7cu8Pnj8fPKBAVxfWFFCYwB3XWJovqIDVp8mR3B0ZFQoOC94KpcBmeo383aM_61SSo90gZuyZVW0i-wM7NDl9iyLBN8x2SLwwUPIrOZ74ts9C8yqHGMPY6Tv69a-iOSlIsLiUMFSy1amlAq7o6ZrVdXQtO10M43LMS1ZU0YA4yZ3t1Z3m-AyIYaTUW_bAKxxHGeKwnei1u-dtsKGJymOOFKXx3Eji6GBG_eSj6zCYOwfvotWaAkRmW_lqAo4atlegS36O2BKESkn8M1AwcCW1gi5gmpTLPk8r-sbjhxB8UC98wU45x4Mm8jnlucbSyDu9n0Nrd-UnXdqFM%3D) Friend, While Democrats focus all their efforts on driving up the national debt, our Congressman Mike Gallagher has been playing a key role in questioning top military leaders to get to the bottom of **_how_** and **_why_** our withdrawal from Afghanistan ended in such an avoidable, disastrous fashion. In case you missed the recent hearings, here’s a recap of how Mike has been holding our leaders accountable: [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f2a1c28a39fc465bb6e9f278bf890fed&_e=1cWzOJQ27K-Q66ZNML3fY2JbKiBrXM_CnwahCqJfDJZjS-Gu68bVCOvtFf9IXlFxepaPi-j166N4eAaL9_LkhXAbTEvf4gIHbMaV26OCF2lhLo2aEGRq71uEc9wzZL3slu1POa4zaEelIviKDuiR-sOEuTUKM7cu8Pnj8fPKBAVxfWFFCYwB3XWJovqIDVp8mR3B0ZFQoOC94KpcBmeo383aM_61SSo90gZuyZVW0i-wM7NDl9iyLBN8x2SLwwUPIrOZ74ts9C8yqHGMPY6TvytmZ7nUqza8I37X-yFPPQVY41MAKd1hP6IGi6WCKr3kYjmdEGXlvaxhZxUOeHhNs2ADcYWmmaT_ldRT91ZjsXE37JFQBB92AkX3ItU7WNCtB8hJIJf2vWD2eDYnGOK8xZWF8yNSa-xYxKXFxsLh4nTyDTqzsvqQ4rLAZe1oZSw3IVYHIylg8GGrmyHyk-JI_dwi9HF1KF92kNZQg9-oQIU%3D) **[READ]** [**REP. GALLAGHER: TRUSTING TALIBAN WAS “ORIGINAL SIN” THAT LED TO AVOIDABLE DEATHS OF SERVICE MEMBERS**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f2a1c28a39fc465bb6e9f278bf890fed&_e=1cWzOJQ27K-Q66ZNML3fY54gZcuSVTKKCpz5TXfTYAWB2DuJKH2ZCqeqTmqSrVDzW4XLi2-crW5txxQfvqqPCA_8MMlaO8SYl7VvHjKs64khGrQ5gUOZeJDJmy_eifWTqXWOaN--OES9axhuW1uTy-7EjMeHwChrQ4rxQ8y6Nx4BHydyvvptB5y55T4scSH7BatbWCgLGIoBaiSsECXt1MasaatK_Ie953sEsemT6toEcb6rKu6e1FQSwZCiBnSmK6XlvXzcbCfPnDVBtGFQRmrcRTJDyqU-X3mFZLuHH64NP9fBIzb7T1FAY_imU6I1zaB0DVdTPWLDrTu-_bVQpJrLB11UNbiVjP54U8JF45amOaPPzGQmvhY1YI7gTuz20yGckb4JRXhutM8GmtRkI8Y6Gq1HDlLBR0fllOJ3JYgtxyTdGJxxR2tx_jfa9aIcf0fiGxMoupAxp8yluhTCuL4eqxgWoZ8X68cvMC0Xp7OQJx2oOdQKTJ3SFkwkQWHAZ9M0eVslO9JBmqk72iabWA%3D%3D) **Bottom Line:**_“[Rep. Mike Gallagher] argues that a top general's decision to turn down the Taliban’s offer to allow the United States to secure Kabul and instead rely on the Taliban and the terrorist Haqqani network was the “original sin” that led to the suicide bombing in which 13 U.S. service members were killed. Gallagher asked McKenzie if it was true that the Taliban offered to allow the U.S. to maintain security over all of Kabul, not just the airport, when the Afghan government collapsed on Aug. 15. The general confirmed it and said he turned the offer down._ – Washington Examiner **[READ]** [**REP. GALLAGHER QUESTIONS GEN. MCKINZIE ON REJECTED OFFER TO CONTROL KABUL DURING EVACUATION**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f2a1c28a39fc465bb6e9f278bf890fed&_e=1cWzOJQ27K-Q66ZNML3fYzK_-SEljZG59iYghUjE_GNqdT4aybGwGAAL-V4F_xAQgJfMN29WS2Tqg0w07rQMuywrVHHbZo6Oiql-l8Ns0lcBaMiTR-Ej527i-442VduAn3P6OfaObHZhNB5NoZPApqUWixb0RecQQoULT371BCLxqlXCN-Pkm6l42fnqJFo0I2kFJSna-rL-FCSfYGoJNbuwd7U3H_REN8uF90mHYXOHhQLZKxk45GIFfeYPPxrpgzjoaEuy9gKX7RXYmkI1Y-IbTk_J7bj95AQLmSqYd5g9oTNw0naakWE_MhAGDVqVg3gGrnLfPIhT3PTzaRwaHwSiGV3PwT-79wxcAHwQJjAMm9qM2x5Lj190PXH2os9drKULtuKzWKlkJJ0d12bXDlsX3wAPD3nuOn4Mfk7jHsibL5ruH3HLbhIq8BalO3ABrr0Pq2-Anw8Xxn-qoCxOhrsMl7CkKXfOlISXzzahmgoHQV-tAePeif7ExPnDZYclFHN7raCmmlmdGnZBIgsckQ%3D%3D) **Bottom Line:**_“The head of the US Central Command admitted Wednesday that the Taliban offered to let American troops take charge of security in Kabul during the final days of the US evacuation from Afghanistan — an offer the US did not accept — while Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin blamed the State Department for the failed evacuation of American citizens, green card holders and Afghan allies.”_ – New York Post **[LISTEN]** [**REP. GALLAGHER PUSHES BACK ON FALSE CLAIM THAT WITHDRAWAL WAS A “LOGISTICAL SUCCESS”**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f2a1c28a39fc465bb6e9f278bf890fed&_e=1cWzOJQ27K-Q66ZNML3fY4-pDltTaOEmS24V0UVQpZZxYaWpOq-kte0Qa_-1gKukdkbeDi6W673r0ONBMgP5q3FTpiVh0R0T7uxdALc7bptp04QApLj-ca5789Rg-2lVh1jjJfN7VzdYbNJ5uA4xZJV22AlpF3BBh8dkKX9Ads0-JGmoI5-UcGDozIMBeg8Ilu-XsocFF1hCS_BRnWIe_yweSE1_2Z8uhDuJeup99ALldJd2Hd2nkFLS3jjThi6okr8ZQ3mFpo0G_H6KXhgo6IyFRPlovUiyGLZ2C9bws_W8Yp60coVyHyrJ41hkeA5ifPNQk_Sk3UfzYSuyaPf9K1xzceSAwZs5ezeboL4E_jPNmQDuggoz3MsQnG4m2tqjaZ2BKDtD8mHBZxDe4lHHGLIjbSv4a_301Y66onr3v-aXNL7HRNhPHY1mt89gwy5QA2_IYs-NLmww_K4tp028-sgfpxnN17biCeeHGxpkh0xNNPL3m2Zb491qh6j79UfuqKrOXm3vYY4f9W8nXoy6Sijj_UNDd9DEKhQYObtxLGpj6NFZtKI7T11J_9FYphQhjUSilK31m4_YrLaLAxvZ61ThhO145JGhEj1pjYKa2FvD-co34MorSo7zMfCDfoSW) **Bottom Line:**_“I would say you’re seeing a million others try to hide behind this strategic failure. But logistical success, even on just the logistical side, the operation of surrender and withdrawal itself, I think it was a massive failure so for the top brass to portray it as a success, I think is a lie. And, you know, I expect Biden to lie to us, but I don’t expect a four star general to do it.”_ – Rep. Gallagher Friend, while we are making progress, the fight for accountability and transparency is far from over –– and we will keep you updated as Mike continues to do the hard work necessary to deliver the answers our country deserves. Thank you, Gallagher Foreign Policy Team [**DONATE NOW: SUPPORT MIKE’S LEADERSHIP**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f2a1c28a39fc465bb6e9f278bf890fed&_e=1cWzOJQ27K-Q66ZNML3fY2JbKiBrXM_CnwahCqJfDJZjS-Gu68bVCOvtFf9IXlFxepaPi-j166N4eAaL9_LkhXAbTEvf4gIHbMaV26OCF2lhLo2aEGRq71uEc9wzZL3slu1POa4zaEelIviKDuiR-sOEuTUKM7cu8Pnj8fPKBAVxfWFFCYwB3XWJovqIDVp8mR3B0ZFQoOC94KpcBmeo383aM_61SSo90gZuyZVW0i-wM7NDl9iyLBN8x2SLwwUPIrOZ74ts9C8yqHGMPY6Tv4s-52Gex9cnra6DYNIHEu2biL4SuDAtv4QEb_PC7-0TuePyh0Z9ewY2y12gRfJXxPKFcFQqTsymAWU4J4gh4L3DaAOPUUcI-XacVgPNLpewpsHZEKmoOQkwLkKJQmoQ4_vZWvByfPjz77yS5IB6HKwIel7bfe-kmp1hvpCG9HeRv-rZHq6GhYDHexlfrBixa7KsvBHP1CJPyMd28wywA0Q%3D) |

Mike Gallagher] argues that a top general's decision to turn down the Taliban’s offer to allow the United States to secure Kabul and instead rely on the Taliban and the terrorist Haqqani network was the “original sin” that led to the suicide bombing in which 13 U.S. service members were killed. Gallagher asked McKenzie if it was true that the Taliban offered to allow the U.S. to maintain security over all of Kabul, not just the airport, when the Afghan government collapsed on Aug. 15. The general confirmed it and said he turned the offer down. – Washington Examiner [READ] Bottom Line:“The head of the US Central Command admitted Wednesday that the Taliban offered to let American troops take charge of security in Kabul during the final days of the US evacuation from Afghanistan — an offer the US did not accept — while Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin blamed the State Department for the failed evacuation of American citizens, green card holders and Afghan allies.” – New York Post [LISTEN] Bottom Line:“I would say you’re seeing a million others try to hide behind this strategic failure. But logistical success, even on just the logistical side, the operation of surrender and withdrawal itself, I think it was a massive failure so for the top brass to portray it as a success, I think is a lie. And, you know, I expect Biden to lie to us, but I don’t expect a four star general to do it.” – Rep. Gallagher Friend, while we are making progress, the fight for accountability and transparency is far from over –– and we will keep you updated as Mike continues to do the hard work necessary to deliver the answers our country deserves. Thank you, Gallagher Foreign Policy Team | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: URGENT TRUMP UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you support PERMANENTLY banning Trump from Twitter? >>
| | [Do you support PERMANENTLY banning DONALD TRUMP from Twitter?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_) | | We're outraged:**Donald Trump just asked a federal court to force Twitter to reinstate his account.**_**NO!!**_

Trump used his platform to spread lies, spew hate, and even incite an insurrection.

We refuse to sit idly by while he tries to force his way back online -- but we need grassroots Democrats everywhere to STAND with us to make our voices heard.

[**So before midnight, let us know: Do you support PERMANENTLY banning Trump from Twitter? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqb~)

**NAME:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Petition Signature:** [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6_A_Pf~)
---

We can't believe what we're seeing.

Donald Trump just asked a federal judge to FORCE Twitter to reinstate his outrageous, hate-filled account.

**Please remember:** Trump used his platform to spread lies, undermine trust in our elections, and even incite a white supremacist insurrection -- _and it was a HUGE reason why he was able to win the White House._

**So make no mistake:** The American people can't afford to let Trump return to Twitter --_let alone the presidency._

Here at Democratic HQ, we need to know whether our best supporters have our backs in the face of Trump's attempts to return to Twitter AND to the White House.

[**So we 're calling for your immediate response: Do you SUPPORT permanently banning Trump from Twitter? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)

We cannot allow him to resume his attacks on our democracy unfiltered and unopposed.

But we can't do it without your help.

[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Tell us where you stand on Trump's return to Twitter >>](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45728554&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMDQ5MzA4OAS2&l=14040222&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45728554&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMDQ5MzA4OAS2&l=14040222&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Diego Rodriguez
subject: My new opponent...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084125/310010889/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zz_XqP09OH1eaUGBwM2BUDSZOlUTTrFaA87BwQkUlqY=&emci=efcb4051-0d26-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=d11004a4-1226-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=10950315)
---
Someone new has entered the race to be Arizona's next Attorney General. Like several other of my opponents, **he seems to have had a hard time figuring _what_ exactly he stands for.**

His name is Rodney Glassman and in 2010, he ran for the Senate as a Democrat — and lost. In 2018, he ran for the Arizona Corporation Commission as a Republican — and lost. In 2020, he ran for Maricopa County Assessor as a Republican — and lost again.

I've been a Democrat my whole life. I have _always_ fought to make life better for folks in need. Those values don't change just because the political landscape does.

name: Gary Black
subject: Do you think the IRS should track you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/3bcbda5608857ad4c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
|
---
# **Friend — Joe Biden, Raphael Warnock, and the rest of the Democrats want to give the IRS the power to track your financial transactions.**

---
That’s right, now included in their $3.5 trillion regressive wish list is a provision that would let the IRS monitor any financial transactions greater than $600.

You can’t make this stuff up. I’m flatly opposed to such an unprecedented, unwarranted, and un-American invasion of financial privacy.**[Do you agree? SIGN here if so. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/606ef33e0c4ef5efc3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
[**SIGN MY NAME »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/2336bdd0a526b4a5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
The $3.5 trillion bill was bad enough as was, and now it’s even worse. Not only do the Regressive Democrats want unconstitutional mandates on businesses and workers, but they also want to track your financial transactions too.

My opponent Raphael Warnock is a leading supporter of this monstrosity, and it’s one more reason why we MUST defeat him in November to win back the U.S. Senate.

**I want to show Warnock and his allies that Georgians and Americans aren’t going to stand for the IRS tracking their personal financial decisions. **

[**Will you stand in that gap with me? SIGN your name now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/beab6e9bba950182c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/335c10f69d9c2ef8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
Gary Black
[**SIGN MY NAME »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/2f6313090f37915ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
|
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_

I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.

With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8f0b81aca58aa247/383d9ca6a2ee88efc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
|
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=8f0b81aca58aa247&d=3b20a89d1f98fbb6c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=8f0b81aca58aa247).

Gary Black for Senate

Athens, GA 30604

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084173/310010946/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_-g61l7eJWmZRT3DfHMRGf3JusRaYzVMc21tcLTg1U=)

| | Hey folks -- Kate here, Elaine’s campaign manager. Elaine is working hard to pass legislation on the issues that you care about most such as infrastructure, and the team and I want to send her some words of encouragement to show her how much we appreciate her dedication. [**Take this brief survey and tell us why you support Elaine’s work in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084174/310010947/-218259059?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_-g61l7eJWmZRT3DfHMRGf3JusRaYzVMc21tcLTg1U=&emci=76b8467d-f225-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=cd1004a4-1226-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7932963) | | | [Survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084175/310010948/-218259059?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_-g61l7eJWmZRT3DfHMRGf3JusRaYzVMc21tcLTg1U=&emci=76b8467d-f225-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=cd1004a4-1226-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7932963)
---
One of the main reasons I support Elaine and wanted to be part of her team is her track record of delivering results -- she’s dedicated her _entire life_ to public service.
Before running for Congress, she served 20 years in the Navy and was one of the first women in their nuclear power program -- defending our country and breaking down barriers for women in the Armed Forces in the process.
Now, she’s ranked the second most effective member of the House -- she’s always fighting for what she thinks is right, and for Coastal Virginian priorities.
[**I’d love to hear why you support Elaine and what inspired you to join our campaign. Will you take a moment to let us know?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084176/310010949/-218259059?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_-g61l7eJWmZRT3DfHMRGf3JusRaYzVMc21tcLTg1U=&emci=76b8467d-f225-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=cd1004a4-1226-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=7932963)

body:
|
| | | Hey Peter, Taylor wanted me to check up on you. (Please read below.) We have invited you to renew your exclusive membership to our 1776 Donor Club several times. We're really disappointed you haven't taken us up on our offer yet! We NEED good and true Conservatives like YOU to stand up for Trump's legacy! We really thought we could count on you. Can we depend on you to join ASAP to make sure your membership remains active?
---

---
Thanks for defending America First, Ethan, House Conservatives \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Taylor's iPhone, Me (2) Date: September 22, 2021 at 9:58 AM Subject: RE: Your payment is pending: To: Ethan, House Republicans Ethan, I need you to get in contact with them immediately! Can you make sure they saw our message about their TERMINATED membership to our 1776 Donor Club? We've reached out time and time again with no luck, and I am getting discouraged. I'm starting to wonder if they are still the Top Trump Patriot we thought they were. _[Let me know ASAP. This is important. Thanks.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "Let me know ASAP. This is important. Thanks.")_ Taylor \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: MEMBERSHIP SERVICES (via House Republicans) Date: September 13, 2021 at 11:21 AM Subject: Your payment is pending:
---

**Hey Trump Patriot,**
**IMPORTANT NOTICE:
Your 1776 Donor Club Membership MUST be renewed
**
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r)
---

_Kindly renew before midnight TONIGHT so there 's no lapse in your membership!_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r)
---

**AS YOU KNOW, the Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for Trump and for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Trump Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**
**[Chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left's attacks.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "Chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left’s attacks. ")**
245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone. We are depending on you to renew your membership...

---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

Patriot, President Trump and House Conservatives are watching what you do in this moment: You can ignore this email and give Nancy Pelosi more power in Congress, _OR_**[you can RUSH your $17.76 gift to renew your membership to an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "you can RUSH
your $17.76 gift to renew your membership to an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!")**
---
| | | [CHIP IN $17.76](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "CHIP IN $17.76")
---

America's Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you've got the chance to do the same. **[Chip in $17.76 ASAP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473671:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "Chip in $17.76
ASAP!")**

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

P.S. House Republicans are only inviting our TOP Trump Patriots to renew their membership. Don't let us down by wasting your chance!

---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473672:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "Trump Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473672:JsySQI2pN:m:1:3253819041:3F8EC809B5969CCCE30B4329DBBD1873:r "%%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%, can we count on you to step up?")******************

body:

Hi Peter, it’s Veronica with a campaign update!

With Election Day now **less than a month away** , we are entering a critical time in our race.

Although Hala is leading in the polls, a Roanoke College poll released last week shows Hala’s lead against her radical Republican opponent _shrinking_ , now at just **5 points.**

This poll makes it clear: **We need an all-out fundraising push to get back our momentum, reach critical voters, and knock on as many doors as we can!**

Our team has jam-packed the campaign calendar with a ton of organizing opportunities through election day, but maintaining such a robust organizing program is expensive.

[**With Election Day mere weeks away, we’re counting on supporters like you, Peter, to step up and chip in to see this through. We need to raise $3,000 by midnight to reach as many voters as possible. Will you chip in $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084326/310011356/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20211005_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1aBZy84mSLBwSEVGbow9WsUQWB9MC_cdCbcDWpaQ3Q=) **** $3,000 GOAL **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084343/310011378/-1547699132?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=HAFV_20211005_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjEwMDRhNC0xMjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1aBZy84mSLBwSEVGbow9WsUQWB9MC_cdCbcDWpaQ3Q=)

name: Laurie Bishop
subject: WATCH: My speech at the March for Reproductive Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084523/310011896/-1122890460?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211005march_lb_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=)
---
Friend, Last weekend, **I joined 400 other Montanans in Helena to fight for choice at the Montana March for Reproductive Rights.** This march and rally was part of a nationwide day of action in response to the ongoing Republican attacks on access to abortion and reproductive choice across the country. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084524/310011897/-1122890460?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211005march_lb_active_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=)
---
I was honored to speak at the rally, sharing my personal experience fighting back against anti-choice legislation in Montana’s House of Representatives. **[You can watch my speech here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084525/310011898/-1122890460?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211005march_lb_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=)**
**Serving for three terms, I’ve come to understand the truth about these bills, and what’s really at stake. Make no mistake: they have never been about anyone’s health.**
I have been a member of the House Judiciary Committee since I began serving in 2017. In that time, I have seen numerous abortion bills come across my desk that attempted to take away health care options for Montanans, including some that would impact my own care at a time when I was struggling with my health.
If these previous experiences weren’t enough to show us the true intentions of our Republican-controlled legislature, they became crystal clear last legislative session. “Born Alive” legislation — based on the myth that botched live abortions commonly occur — came to us in two forms in 2021: a bill that, if brought for a vote, would have passed and been signed by Governor Greg Gianforte, and a referendum that would go to the ballot in 2022.
They had every chance to pass the policy bill then and there, but refused to bring the bill up for a vote. In a last effort to pass this horrible bill outright rather than send the referendum to the 2022 ballot, I stood up on the House floor on the last day of the session, and tried to bring it up for a vote.
_The motion failed, which means this awful referendum will be on your ballot in November of 2022._
Why?
**Because this isn't about protecting anyone’s health. This is about protecting the power of the GOP — they want to use this anti-choice ballot initiative to drive their voters to the polls next year.**
That’s why last weekend’s march was so important, why we have to keep up the energy against these despicable attacks on reproductive health, and why we need to elect leaders who will defend choice for every Montanan.
**[Click here to watch my speech, then pitch in a donation to help me keep up the fight for reproductive rights in Montana>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084526/310011899/-1122890460?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211005march_lb_active_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=)**
[WATCH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084527/310011900/-1122890460?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211005march_lb_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=)
---
I will always stand up for choice. Together, we can stop Republicans from turning back the clock on reproductive rights and health care.
— Laurie
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084528/310011901/-152279872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=&emci=d4ef902d-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=a67a3234-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084529/310011902/-2084618464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=&emci=d4ef902d-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=a67a3234-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084530/310011903/-1651013030?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=&emci=d4ef902d-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=a67a3234-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636) [**www.BishopForMontana.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37084531/310011904/-489017696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjdhMzIzNC0xNDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSUvwQ7is_XEM-wYAp4LjYgsIBkaxC1WFAsW3WV71oQ=&emci=d4ef902d-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=a67a3234-1426-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=13640636)

clean_body: | = Friend, Last weekend, I joined 400 other Montanans in Helena to fight for choice at the Montana March for Reproductive Rights. This march and rally was part of a nationwide day of action in response to the ongoing Republican attacks on access to abortion and reproductive choice across the country. | = I was honored to speak at the rally, sharing my personal experience fighting back against anti-choice legislation in Montana’s House of Representatives. = Serving for three terms, I’ve come to understand the truth about these bills, and what’s really at stake. Make no mistake: they have never been about anyone’s health. I have been a member of the House Judiciary Committee since I began serving in 2017. In that time, I have seen numerous abortion bills come across my desk that attempted to take away health care options for Montanans, including some that would impact my own care at a time when I was struggling with my health. If these previous experiences weren’t enough to show us the true intentions of our Republican-controlled legislature, they became crystal clear last legislative session. “Born Alive” legislation — based on the myth that botched live abortions commonly occur — came to us in two forms in 2021: a bill that, if brought for a vote, would have passed and been signed by Governor Greg Gianforte, and a referendum that would go to the ballot in 2022. They had every chance to pass the policy bill then and there, but refused to bring the bill up for a vote. In a last effort to pass this horrible bill outright rather than send the referendum to the 2022 ballot, I stood up on the House floor on the last day of the session, and tried to bring it up for a vote. The motion failed, which means this awful referendum will be on your ballot in November of 2022. Why? Because this isn't about protecting anyone’s health. This is about protecting the power of the GOP — they want to use this anti-choice ballot initiative to drive their voters to the polls next year. That’s why last weekend’s march was so important, why we have to keep up the energy against these despicable attacks on reproductive health, and why we need to elect leaders who will defend choice for every Montanan. = = I will always stand up for choice. Together, we can stop Republicans from turning back the clock on reproductive rights and health care. — Laurie | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Petition -- Left Action
subject: Tell Twitter: "Don't reverse Trump's ban!"
body:
Trump supporters are pushing to end the ban. Make sure Twitter hears from us too!
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [Tell Twitter: "Don't Reverse Trump's Ban!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35e072fd-e536-4d55-a90f-74c2d056d196/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde1d17a9-7f72-4d04-84e5-42bddc8891c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Twitter banned Trump several months ago, after he repeatedly violated the company’s rules (oh, and tried to destroy our democracy). **But now[the company is under renewed pressure](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1148e1cb-eeee-4fb4-b62f-0fb31cadd853/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from fascism enthusiasts (Trump supporters) to reverse the ban, and let Trump tweet again. ** [So far, the company is holding strong](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01d96959-e9b8-4311-aad7-37e5bf0231a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but we need to show them there’s support for keeping the ban in place. They are hearing loud and clear from the Trump mini-me’s, [they need to hear from us as well.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a989f35-f7d6-4884-9660-841e5c414c38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[Sign the Petition: Tell Twitter: "Don’t Reverse Trump’s Ban"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07924686-e240-46ed-b831-43c7bb048e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

[Here's a list of some of our current actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49f46b87-cb98-4895-a495-c66d3d2e6aa1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses.

Fellow patriot,

We send emails to you regularly, but from the tepid response we’re getting**_we’re now wondering if you’re aware of how absolutely dangerous President Biden and Senate Democrats truly are_**.

We tried to warn you last year that Biden was a Trojan Horse,**a façade for socialism**. Biden isn’t a moderate – no matter what he says or what the media tells you. name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Vaccine denial
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In every campaign, there are moments where it’s important people come together to say, “NO! We’re not going to accept that.”
#

Friends,
In every campaign, there are moments where it’s important people come together to say, “NO! We’re not going to accept that.”
We had one of those moments recently: **One of Mark’s Republican opponents challenged the need to get vaccinated against COVID-19. A vaccine that is saving lives.**
_We must not accept that._
But the truth is, this is a big part of what’s at stake in this election.
Either we get someone who divides us, rejects the science behind vaccines, and questions the legitimacy of our elections.
Or we get to keep Mark Kelly — someone who is willing to set aside partisan differences, bring people together, and work toward common-sense solutions that move our country forward.
The good news is that you have a big say in which vision wins. Which is why we’re asking:

subject: I wanted to let you know...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
We can now report our fundraising numbers for the past quarter.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37086980/310032858/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211005Q3_N_CD_5_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY5YzMwNS0xYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xg8U_jKGcbuS076xAwTyluEoJyiKWlLfBowCwahWZs=)

Derek,

Just a little over five weeks ago, I launched my campaign for Congress. I've been overwhelmed by the support I've seen in the short period of time since, and I'm more confident than ever that our pro-working family, pro-union, and pro-democracy message can prevail.

Our numbers for our first FEC filing deadline further confirm that we have momentum. **We ended the quarter having raised $255,000 to date, with over 650 individual contributions — many from right here in western Pennsylvania.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37086981/310032859/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211005Q3_N_CD_5_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY5YzMwNS0xYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xg8U_jKGcbuS076xAwTyluEoJyiKWlLfBowCwahWZs=) These are incredibly strong numbers given the short time we've been in the race, and I wouldn’t be posting them without the help of incredible grassroots supporters like you. Together, we're entering the next stage of this race as a robust campaign that has what it takes to win a battleground House district.

In the days ahead, I'm focused on continuing to meet, support, and work alongside our region’s elected and community leaders. Whether it’s learning about nuclear power with IBEW Local 29 at the Beaver Valley Power Station, spending time with committee members in Mt. Lebanon and Green Tree, firing up Beaver County voters to support our Democratic slate of 2021 judicial candidates, knocking doors for county council candidates, rallying against Harrisburg’s partisan election review in the North Hills, organizing with the Steelworkers at Pitt, or our own campaign kickoff in my hometown borough of Thornburg, this campaign is working hard to earn support across western Pennsylvania. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37086982/310032860/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211005Q3_N_CD_5_G_N_P2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY5YzMwNS0xYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xg8U_jKGcbuS076xAwTyluEoJyiKWlLfBowCwahWZs=) **Keeping up this critical work will take a full team effort — especially because Republicans will soon be mobilizing to stop us, having seen our strong fundraising numbers.** [**If you haven't already, please join our growing movement to keep PA-17 blue by chipping in $10 or more.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37086983/310032861/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211005Q3_N_CD_5_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY5YzMwNS0xYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xg8U_jKGcbuS076xAwTyluEoJyiKWlLfBowCwahWZs=) ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37086984/310032862/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211005Q3_N_CD_5_G_N_B1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY5YzMwNS0xYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xg8U_jKGcbuS076xAwTyluEoJyiKWlLfBowCwahWZs=)**** Thank you,

Chris | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37086985/310032863/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_211005Q3_N_CD_5_G_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmY5YzMwNS0xYjI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Xg8U_jKGcbuS076xAwTyluEoJyiKWlLfBowCwahWZs=)****

clean_body: Peter, Our Border Patrol agents put everything on the line daily to protect Americans from the threats at our southern border. I am proudto be a supporter of our CBP officers, but not every American has the same views on law enforcement as you and me: President Biden is spreading false stories that drag the reputations of our Border Patrol agents through the mud. False stories that accuse our Border Patrol of abusing and whipping migrants , which is an untrue SLANDERING of agents who were simply doing their jobs of protecting our border. These accusations, from a sitting President no less , are unacceptable and a terrifying result of Biden’s out-of-touch worldview and constant government overreach. Today, it’s Border Patrol, but any industry or group could be the next recipient of public character defamation by this President. I refuse to be a bystander, Peter. Will you join my efforts by signing my petition to support the Border Patrol? Together, we can show Joe Biden and anyone else attempting to smear the character of CBP officers that Americans do NOT stand for this erroneousdefamation of our law enforcement. As your next Senator, I will NEVER tolerate false attacks like this one, Peter. Thank you, Katie Britt Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I’m sincerely asking...

|
---

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Peter, I'm excited to share with you this democracy reform legislation I've been working on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter --

I'm excited to share with you a new piece of legislation I've been working on: **the Protecting Our Democracy Act**. I helped introduce this legislation at the end of last month, and I'm confident that it will help restore, strengthen, and protect our country's democracy if we can get it signed into law.

We know now more than ever before that we can't take our democracy for granted. These past few years we've experienced unprecedented attacks that have pushed our democracy to the brink.

During the Trump years, the former president and his enablers abused their power, ignored laws, and undermined institutions for personal and political gain. Donald Trump fired and intimidated staff who sought to tell the truth. He attempted to extort a foreign country into digging up dirt against a political opponent. He and members of his administration ignored lawful subpoenas to testify before Congress. He turned the White House lawn into a stage for his political theater. He sought to interfere in the work of the Justice Department. He took money that was appropriated by Congress to fund military schools and other vital projects and diverted it to try to build a border wall that was never approved by Congress. And as his damaging term came to an end, he sought to undermine the results of the presidential election.

That's why passing the Protecting Our Democracy Act couldn't be more critical. This sweeping package of reforms will help restore and strengthen our system of checks and balances, improve accountability and transparency, protect our elections from interference, both domestic and foreign, and ensure no politician (not even the president) is above the law.

**[Peter, it's time to restore our democracy's guardrails. Will you add your name next to mine? Become a citizen co-sponsor of the Protecting Our Democracy Act today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/Z7yKbrrr8oYZky3-iSLSu_XV3qjLMQiSZAe0ShxHJr4=?ms=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

The Protecting our Democracy Act takes some vital steps:

**First:** We must prevent future presidents from acting with impunity and without consequence. That means preventing abuses of presidential pardons. It means suspending the statute of limitations on federal crimes committed by a president or vice president to make clear that _no one is above the law_. It means enforcing the Emoluments Clauses to prevent federal officials from profiting off of their service to the people and strengthening the Hatch Act to provide stronger enforcement and penalties for violations. It means protecting whistleblowers, preventing political interference in the work of the Justice Department, and preserving the independence of inspectors general.

**Second:** Congress must reaffirm its authority as a coequal branch of government. It must reassert Congress's power of the purse by strengthening the Impoundment Control Act and adding penalties for failure to comply. It must create tools to enforce congressional subpoenas and limit presidential declarations of emergencies. And importantly, it must reestablish Congress as a check on presidential overreach and corruption.

**Finally:** Congress must take meaningful steps to prevent foreign interference in our elections and fix our broken campaign finance system. Until corruption is brought into the light and ultimately rooted out, we can expect nefarious actors to continue working to interfere and undermine our electoral process. Campaigns should be required to report any attempts by foreign actors to influence American elections -- and there must be significant penalties for accepting or encouraging foreign influence.

A deteriorating democracy can't deliver results and achieve progress. That's why I'm committed to doing everything I can to protect and strengthen our democracy so it works better for the people and to restore the American people's faith in our government.

We've got too much to do, from expanding health care access to protecting our environment, to wait any longer to take action. **Democracy is not a spectator sport, we all must be in this fight to root out corruption, give power back to the people, and strengthen our democratic systems.**

**[Add your name today to become a citizen co-sponsor of this critical legislation. Help us show broad public support for protecting our democracy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/Z7yKbrrr8oYZky3-iSLSu_XV3qjLMQiSZAe0ShxHJr4=?ms=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/qGQoLIXMXFmPlkBCNvaFQAszlA2izyU2c3U3aPXleJ4=?refcode=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/MdO6pEhMYNBN6S7J0CB7AplruG5jWfd9en2xdBWjyPw=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/jU3bt6tdQKx9kBGhfVFUQoOYxnJBBBgmUYUWrLMLi28=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/qGQoLIXMXFmPlkBCNvaFQAszlA2izyU2c3U3aPXleJ4=?refcode=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211005_prodem_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Askpc79UNkiy_4emL3n-1uApdV7QT8_CKP3hDiEdpwc=/mB3PN2c8OvYzBYmdAuQjkRgEbDjBFWsq2OkDNT8j6kg=).

name: Eric Greitens
subject: I’m asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Wouldn’t you prefer a pro-Trump Senate majority?
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5a433dbcfc2543dc8d17fbfec19dae9f&_m=56d735f492a942d3849e57574e52ff7d&_e=N3TgATB7ASO4lp_6LYzJqnSX2r2Z2Y392Y1ZZvOF8-VIelVzfst52WHn9JjprlBvp62P0PZv5I7aYFMWKGrnEe_e_eT3pgRV6RgW87K_Mu_NB1QQH0f8p8zNO5Qg4adWOe0qJJPKf8T0Iau3bWXTDU0_fuo4iAoetwvXyMxkdgTNstGPAGyIsP9BwaRoCQfgPDGLBWrDoYi2zUIJzO8umKvAuNJh2buUJ_ZEc7NNmsGXezoFIjoZVPbtOQ5lZvPj0jP4DpcUdG4EkgF_fySBGeXys8oKUF6Vyf-xcx0Iriyo-pWd9Wt6bJHCz_IjyMyEkQOoXkXBEcuWGH8a0pQ0QTjPd_PVokJwRS8nf47UEaapxMoPn-HQHaaw23w511loaRLZh_wBMQR0RTp2M0ouwLJhpWRaWKPTUj7SPd7HwbBsk2OUahja-7t_8iBPlR8XVJCQGJhKwrzLzVj08XO26ujNMpNQV1H4FnnvD-GgMjMRIhwnJBFBj8vr7oLYDLbOnNGSz6FiDIDTKGD1Kh5exQ00d_g04co88B9WoschUuU%3D)
---
Peter,
---
With Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority hanging on by just 1 seat, we must ask ourselves what a new Republican majority ought to look like.
---
We can’t be complacent with just _any_ Republican majority. We need a pro-Trump majority with the spine to fight for our conservative values -- a majority that will ALWAYS put America FIRST.
---
**That’s why I’ve remained steadfast in my decision, that after we WIN this open Senate seat needed to end Kamala’s 50-50 majority, I will __NOT__ vote for Mitch McConnell as leader. **
---

clean_body: Wouldn’t you prefer a pro-Trump Senate majority? | Peter, With Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority hanging on by just 1 seat, we must ask ourselves what a new Republican majority ought to look like. We can’t be complacent with just any Republican majority. We need a pro-Trump majority with the spine to fight for our conservative values -- a majority that will ALWAYS put America FIRST. That’s why I’ve remained steadfast in my decision, that after we WIN this open Senate seat needed to end Kamala’s 50-50 majority, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell as leader. But above all else, I want to know where grassroots conservatives like YOU stand on this issue. Senate Leadership Survey: Participant: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Status:[Pending] Deadline: Tonight @ 10:45 P.M. Fellow Conservative,

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!** [**That’s why I need you to help me protect this Missouri senate seat, immediately.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a8e1d55c611f4d15854e61c58466295d&_e=0uQczJqrUDnRtWRIT04ZBa5iairF19J20KRvSEWJddLfJSEDN683HCTrpKho7umbZRrUNKKMUS9pKfiJlEc3jsx5Ptzc0KsmudqlKbAZq-Ud5L_vJIiv-5dn8II8DaUpTNe1OmmeAqr84f9MLzCNSF4VYKiEgBshgZ1ui5TDfreOf1ujTLmWt3fE_8Eu7uYtiozVkUGFz3T3odaI0ka4iXxhCCqJ4VDl6VCFJA7FgjlK9-Xvue5mrBiC7kwv8RHl7hqGZMluvHAoeJmXqkg7MuSvn0k2OVaAdYqLkaOfm4mYGhHd7a-UFo6vXORFnCDZcuwuoenvjM273Xe16mfkiJNjE8qURyvdy1LFKfpM_XXu626fuD_4VsBRn_KnmS1d7S4K0oDAGhKA8VGpmqydoRWtKOHewWG7CxL5Oji7DnZv0zGhrN6LzD2XZg-1_tMDVk6tuYWqKGbstGEBsK5JvQ%3D%3D)

America wasn’t built with handouts, it was built on the back of hard-working people who respected our flag, **I will fight to get folks back to work and our economy moving again.**

While these techy liberal billionaires on the West Coast may not care about election security, **I DO!** We need to require voters to show a photo ID and put an end to ballot harvesting not fund it!

[**As your next Senator from Missouri, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure the voices of conservative Americans like you get heard in Washington.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a8e1d55c611f4d15854e61c58466295d&_e=0uQczJqrUDnRtWRIT04ZBa5iairF19J20KRvSEWJddLfJSEDN683HCTrpKho7umbZRrUNKKMUS9pKfiJlEc3jsx5Ptzc0KsmudqlKbAZq-Ud5L_vJIiv-5dn8II8DaUpTNe1OmmeAqr84f9MLzCNSF4VYKiEgBshgZ1ui5TDfreOf1ujTLmWt3fE_8Eu7uYtiozVkUGFz3T3odaI0ka4iXxhCCqJ4VDl6VCFJA7FgjlK9-Xvue5mrBiC7kwv8RHlI1zlJQl0PRhYwiVoO2NtssXilukZZng3OxrwKRGR3hN-s8n3LiII2RrWqhf2FwQGJ8Erl0UUMTPqxa7eKUenu9LEOwg3_a7iMO2B_POxCfiCCSXZ11rWCBB2jSc7fP3KWI50JjCKx3Vyc2BWw8KMPi4ONzx4uGwR1yrHAWyMwwDipLD8Jt_VCdcxJxw3I4Xam_uL1RkZqRHE8pdU_lLC_Q%3D%3D) **Just take a look at my To-Do-List for when I get to the Senate:**

* Stop Out-of-Control Spending

* Secure the Border
* Secure our Elections
* Put a stop to the _“woke”_ insanity coming out of Washington, D.C

Nothing on the list above will be achieved if a Democrat wins this race, Fellow Conservative. [**That’s why I am counting on you to help me ensure the Left doesn’t increase their power and further force their radical agenda in America.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=a8e1d55c611f4d15854e61c58466295d&_e=0uQczJqrUDnRtWRIT04ZBa5iairF19J20KRvSEWJddLfJSEDN683HCTrpKho7umbZRrUNKKMUS9pKfiJlEc3jsx5Ptzc0KsmudqlKbAZq-Ud5L_vJIiv-5dn8II8DaUpTNe1OmmeAqr84f9MLzCNSF4VYKiEgBshgZ1ui5TDfreOf1ujTLmWt3fE_8Eu7uYtiozVkUGFz3T3odaI0ka4iXxhCCqJ4VDl6VCFJA7FgjlK9-Xvue5mrBiC7kwv8RHlWMLHEv9dlBtdwkLudlMFmPyyjJAbK7rMJQeiV_-H8_kSevf_USw8P8L6fgBWU-hYrmVKBCmG8mwIeXJedwmXRCjhnIDXeYeOGX7L1ZIKM_scOMSTK96jjuJOwwYkzQULNaeeilmQxBM9ibjmuXTymWtEn2EvZbf1pdYqL-_nop7sYsJhJh3AEv8_Dcq5A6w3syNzXRQX4r1TUSfRGJSeJA%3D%3D)
