name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zloa1gmbil2u05c874k06iqmqlve88dkuspfjep0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5hmeor4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhml9i5orjrkcuq7b7pjpsrb1f03i13ehbdf6oug_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5hmeor4c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmpojfrfro1am1ctm0j5rctughrtjg7acjv8hke0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c5hmeor4c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

This Friend, It’s been a few weeks since we launched the “Win With Derek 2022 Club” and the wave of support we have seen across Kansas has been incredible. This club represents a special group of supporters who are willing to step up and do the most for our campaign by making at least a $20.22 monthly donation. They’re the donors that are going to propel us to victory. I don’t want you to miss this opportunity to join the club and solidify your status as a TOP-TIER SUPPORTER. When you become a recurring donor for our campaign, you are ensuring that we have the resources to take Kansas back and protect our conservative values. You’ll be helping us reach out to key groups of voters. You’ll be helping fund our eventual television, radio, and digital ads. You’ll be helping us attend more events, grow our grassroots army stronger, and more. I am committed to fighting for you as the next Governor of Kansas. I just need your help to get there. Thank you! subject: What do we have to do to wake you up?

body:
Right now, the base of the Democrat Party supports socialism. As a result, President Biden is perfectly fine spending trillions of dollars in what the |

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d18cb9bd187041e78e76224be3d2204e&_e=U8nBeYnofGH2AsXKB5jvJeHTi5LkvieOg36fozoOa59pT3KhNrMZmEpGJOl7bIAfCRJUhVvvyIsgyweaaUqxkvjVKMj3pICThG1pmwXao1-bCx-QAQwjJ8vyijOLz_zqzZ_MlZBZg9SMzmuNTHWDXdY_cC39wgNtpLTDEK6eoiT5tt4tuC8MKWPG7I8DWevLZz_uZnLvqhrDUBPnMuRdUy_rJHTmyrZCzSn6-XGktBI3JxEBdzdZTp2kW_Okb3uZ8NAU4NdedduMrNm8Vb5MCAqSvxYRA6aziKOSUOoO8SK5eotkPtQdmSMKEizm1WczVYbejbxu0tn52s7pYhIxlmdHhIcc5PEzPlCwUOtv2Z2LE3kp5WKbG3q-8DL1ifbaYQgwxa6Qarpz41YRtusTuaS2V67WnnndHfre0Z5D4IURuLyd6f5GDYHxwmJuzPgxswq0sigMU3f2PP3n3-rD6LfpIy7iFCaN4vtVS8APZt0%3D)

**SURVEY REQUEST:** It’s obvious: Democrats can no longer hide the fact they’re embracing socialism. **[Would you please spare a moment of your time to take our survey on socialism in America today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d18cb9bd187041e78e76224be3d2204e&_e=U8nBeYnofGH2AsXKB5jvJeHTi5LkvieOg36fozoOa59pT3KhNrMZmEpGJOl7bIAfCRJUhVvvyIsgyweaaUqxkvjVKMj3pICThG1pmwXao1-bCx-QAQwjJ8vyijOLz_zqzZ_MlZBZg9SMzmuNTHWDXdY_cC39wgNtpLTDEK6eoiT5tt4tuC8MKWPG7I8DWevLZz_uZnLvqhrDUBPnMuRdUy_rJHTmyrZCzSn6-XGktBI3JxEBdzdZTp2kW_Okb3uZ8NAU4NdedduMrNm8Vb5MCLxr959U746WQM9FcwvWpXQmA19dzaaeeWgxU8nj86OwJ-PeuQrLCyj02jF_cfMoaEE1JizZVuqvnbb42fIygeOCUf1kP-cZ3b4RxZx4cXbPBs3WSNmShsLbEdQdXCZRkhokKZz6-rSbrYFJZVZHy9gWqbswIVugkGGx6xgcD8LukxLdZ6GJ_gjwIpivd2B9uUdAbUTUUa5Q2XMlw0LvCtw%3D)**

Fellow patriot,

We send emails to you regularly, but from the tepid response we’re getting**_we’re now wondering if you’re aware of how absolutely dangerous President Biden and Senate Democrats truly are_**.

We tried to warn you last year that Biden was a Trojan Horse,**a façade for socialism**. Biden isn’t a moderate – no matter what he says or what the media tells you. The truth of the matter is that he goes along to get along – and that means bending to the will of what’s popular in the Democrat Party at any given moment.

**[Do you have a few moments today to take our Socialism in America Survey today to offer your thoughts on this disastrous ideology the far-left Democrats are attempting to force on all of us?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d18cb9bd187041e78e76224be3d2204e&_e=U8nBeYnofGH2AsXKB5jvJeHTi5LkvieOg36fozoOa59pT3KhNrMZmEpGJOl7bIAfCRJUhVvvyIsgyweaaUqxkvjVKMj3pICThG1pmwXao1-bCx-QAQwjJ8vyijOLz_zqzZ_MlZBZg9SMzmuNTHWDXdY_cC39wgNtpLTDEK6eoiT5tt4tuC8MKWPG7I8DWevLZz_uZnLvqhrDUBPnMuRdUy_rJHTmyrZCzSn6-XGktBI3JxEBdzdZTp2kW_Okb3uZ8NAU4NdedduMrNm8Vb5MCDJdLLgUt_o5l_IhRYP3lJLAbKGtWtlEelt_hdUvCDjOK4TQssl-1c4LZklg1UAKA01vFtGIICKOyyJYiq_BMEeeNpOmeAAUGjZyD9rsvWIKqaZ7QFM525aGHiQmHmtVYQlfKhIRwj2X2UAI2D1AhH3Fp_XDba1yzUwplgLg05g6syGJyj5l_6iqprRqv1YiDp2m7o5q-3MaA2ypVCIBWCA%3D)**

Right now, the base of the Democrat Party supports socialism. As a result, President Biden is perfectly fine spending trillions of dollars in what the White House and Senate Democrats deem “human infrastructure.”

The reality of the situation, however, is that Chuck Schumer knows that if he doesn’t at least try to bring European style socialism to the United States, **AOC is going to launch a campaign for his Senate seat**.

**As for Biden, he made a deal with the Devil the day he accepted Bernie Sanders’ endorsement**.

President Biden claims that his $3.5 Trillion “Build Back Better” bill is “overwhelmingly popular” with the American people. We want to know if that’s true.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d18cb9bd187041e78e76224be3d2204e&_e=U8nBeYnofGH2AsXKB5jvJeHTi5LkvieOg36fozoOa59pT3KhNrMZmEpGJOl7bIAfCRJUhVvvyIsgyweaaUqxkvjVKMj3pICThG1pmwXao1-bCx-QAQwjJ8vyijOLz_zqzZ_MlZBZg9SMzmuNTHWDXdY_cC39wgNtpLTDEK6eoiT5tt4tuC8MKWPG7I8DWevLZz_uZnLvqhrDUBPnMuRdUy_rJHTmyrZCzSn6-XGktBI3JxEBdzdZTp2kW_Okb3uZ8NAU4NdedduMrNm8Vb5MCE7JZpO0c76i-nxifrjy6sdUH6v7Y0bGD9PLJaakRT7IOAdE478vmkMuYJQW6i0Z17BSG8ZHtwjsKwPMEA-ZNzEvTBc5uGHYCO32bkFB4kF40bJRfxi7M_-ruyHpoEPMKUxh8waX-2Ig3HB9rBcJK5HYXBPEk7kBsXIDstrlnmj7Cvv2PebC4Ce9_j83qSnbdswJl2nTzT0pOlEqPLSZrsQ%3D)

Please don’t ignore this email – there is too much at stake to delete this without responding.

**We warned you and every American that we could reach during last year’s election that there would be extreme consequences if we all didn’t do our part to keep the White House and the Senate Republican.**

_**Well, the roosters are coming home to roost**_.

We’re quite literally staring down the prospect of living in a socialist nation. If we don’t wake up from our slumber soon, America as we know it is going to be gone forever.

**[Please take 30 seconds out of your day to answer our 5 questions survey right now. It’s critical we know where you stand.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d18cb9bd187041e78e76224be3d2204e&_e=U8nBeYnofGH2AsXKB5jvJeHTi5LkvieOg36fozoOa59pT3KhNrMZmEpGJOl7bIAfCRJUhVvvyIsgyweaaUqxkvjVKMj3pICThG1pmwXao1-bCx-QAQwjJ8vyijOLz_zqzZ_MlZBZg9SMzmuNTHWDXdY_cC39wgNtpLTDEK6eoiT5tt4tuC8MKWPG7I8DWevLZz_uZnLvqhrDUBPnMuRdUy_rJHTmyrZCzSn6-XGktBI3JxEBdzdZTp2kW_Okb3uZ8NAU4NdedduMrNm8Vb5MCJDgV7RyBZAAnb4LPw9P7Kzy8Wlr-Yp0k_Flmfp5lT1EnktlmLDfMTsenXyfHN0xYbjRWvpg6OM7mlpS1HxddFjJOuC7BDEaj1ZWcBiMZFnK91qfngiG9w5khwxqmT4oOQ32USYKk5RnpZE-ZO1MsywWFnmajU_iOtT3F-1qne7a7qHO0qKy6XREQuhFOk-QcPjX3h7Du0iSrRBHI1clD40%3D) **

Senate Republicans **Anyone who supports bringing socialism to the United States must be defeated. We’re committed to getting the job done and we NEED to know that you are, too.**

Failure is simply not an option. The voters need to know their elected officials are not who they pretend to be.

[** ACTIVATE SOCIALISM IN AMERICA SURVEY->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d18cb9bd187041e78e76224be3d2204e&_e=U8nBeYnofGH2AsXKB5jvJeHTi5LkvieOg36fozoOa59pT3KhNrMZmEpGJOl7bIAfCRJUhVvvyIsgyweaaUqxkvjVKMj3pICThG1pmwXao1-bCx-QAQwjJ8vyijOLz_zqzZ_MlZBZg9SMzmuNTHWDXdY_cC39wgNtpLTDEK6eoiT5tt4tuC8MKWPG7I8DWevLZz_uZnLvqhrDUBPnMuRdUy_rJHTmyrZCzSn6-XGktBI3JxEBdzdZTp2kW_Okb3uZ8NAU4NdedduMrNm8Vb5MCMkUIe6IZ0uaoTJSuyAukMZYQKeaN2-4NUBjBgW2ZrtZa0vqhbYEeQkk-tPLF9--3JJsJbhuja5CANrAfZAmpBkVfIGfGh6G_w-gNzQ91Obr3lBPTC6W54Jg83Zxeud65hW_jgB_vGqN9do29-vd12JFTrJTBOIuV_XJl1Aayp_IEj9fz9r7oo6UHGxWhUDG5IMrnu76bJ2E0nQiLB7Dmw4%3D)

Thanks,
Senate Republicans

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course “The Second World Wars” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c477%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=DcTlKsGVXHO6B%2fzcJRjOTg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66806%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScJ10UsZT19MyCE9HGYXUA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66806%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScJ10UsZT19MyCE9HGYXUA&sysid=1) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66807%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xDV%2fcT0uOBAnrnExrWSHFQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Tony Palmer
subject: [ALERT] Cops resign over Vaccine Mandates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAW ENFORCEMENT LOYALTY PAC**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473736:6cCs6I2NP:m:1:3253819041:90C37AA36CCB2B8E357DFED95E4BE1BE:r "Headline") Peter: It's an idea so bad even unions oppose it - mandatory vaccinations for the brave men and women who keep our streets safe and never took a day off over the last 18 months. They faced riots in our cities, a horrifying increase in ambush attacks, and close encounters with citizens as an unknown virus spread through our communities. **Now those same officers are being threatened, targeted, and harassed by politicians who want to mandate and dictate what they must put into their bodies. It 's an unconscionable intrusion against their freedoms and personal decisions, and** _The Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC is taking a stand against the politicians who want to bully the men and women in blue_. **[If you Back the Blue and oppose unconstitutional mandates from progressive politicians, join us by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more so we can put a stop to these outrageous dictates.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473737:6cCs6I2NP:m:1:3253819041:90C37AA36CCB2B8E357DFED95E4BE1BE:r "If you Back the Blue and oppose unconstitutional mandates from
progressive politicians, join us by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more so we can put a stop to these outrageous dictates.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473736:6cCs6I2NP:m:1:3253819041:90C37AA36CCB2B8E357DFED95E4BE1BE:r "Police")**The same progressive politicians pushing 'Defund' bills in Washington and across the country are forcing vaccine mandates on police, and _law enforcement professionals have had enough_.** With a 45% increase in retirements and a 20% increase in resignations over last year, as well as slow recruitment due to the left-wing war on police, progressives are pushing even more police out of the profession. Officers in states across the country are resigning - _sometimes en masse_ - after being threatened with mandates. Officers in California, Colorado, Illinois, Massachusetts, and other states are standing up to these mandates, either by suing jurisdictions or leaving the profession altogether. And police unions are standing behind them. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473736:6cCs6I2NP:m:1:3253819041:90C37AA36CCB2B8E357DFED95E4BE1BE:r "Statement")**The president of Chicago 's police union went as far as saying, _" HELL NO!"_** "It cannot be mandated," he said. "It's that simple. Our members don't want to be mandated to do anything like that. This vaccine has no studies for long-term side effects or consequences. None." **Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC stands shoulder to shoulder with these brave members of the law enforcement community, and _we 're committed to defeating politicians who abuse their authority to force outrageous vaccine mandates on cops_.** | | [STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473736:6cCs6I2NP:m:1:3253819041:90C37AA36CCB2B8E357DFED95E4BE1BE:r "STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY")
---

These are the same brave cops who never took a day off while keeping our streets safe from riots under constant threat from violent criminals and 'Defund' politicians.
**They 've had our backs. _It 's time we have theirs_.**
**[Chip in what you can to help us support principled candidates who won't force their big government dictates on the men and women who put their lives on the line to keep our communities safe.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473736:6cCs6I2NP:m:1:3253819041:90C37AA36CCB2B8E357DFED95E4BE1BE:r "Chip in what you can to help us support principled candidates

It 's an unconscionable intrusion against their freedoms and personal decisions, and The Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC is taking a stand against the politicians who want to bully the men and women in blue. "If you Back the Blue and oppose unconstitutional mandates from progressive politicians, join us by making your immediate contribution of $25, $50, $100, or more so we can put a stop to these outrageous dictates." "Police"The same progressive politicians pushing 'Defund' bills in Washington and across the country are forcing vaccine mandates on police, and law enforcement professionals have had enough. With a 45% increase in retirements and a 20% increase in resignations over last year, as well as slow recruitment due to the left-wing war on police, progressives are pushing even more police out of the profession. Officers in states across the country are resigning - sometimes en masse - after being threatened with mandates. Officers in California, Colorado, Illinois, Massachusetts, and other states are standing up to these mandates, either by suing jurisdictions or leaving the profession altogether. And police unions are standing behind them. "Statement"The president of Chicago 's police union went as far as saying, " HELL NO!" "It cannot be mandated," he said. "It's that simple. Our members don't want to be mandated to do anything like that. This vaccine has no studies for long-term side effects or consequences. None." Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC stands shoulder to shoulder with these brave members of the law enforcement community, and we 're committed to defeating politicians who abuse their authority to force outrageous vaccine mandates on cops. | | "STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY" Police have put everything on the line for our safety, and progressive politicians are ramping up their war on law enforcement by forcing unconstitutional mandates on them. These are the same brave cops who never took a day off while keeping our streets safe from riots under constant threat from violent criminals and 'Defund' politicians. They 've had our backs. It 's time we have theirs. "Chip in what you can to help us support principled candidates who won’t force their big government dictates on the men and women who put their lives on the line to keep our communities safe." Thank you. For your safety, "Tony Palmer" Tony Palmer, SGT (Ret), Virginia Beach Police Dept Chairman of the Advisory Board Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC | "STAND WITH LAW ENFORCEMENT - DONATE TODAY" | PAID FOR BY LAW ENFORCEMENT LOYALTY PAC This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-43792230346-echo7-7FCBB7E12BF86E2EEF35E1D9D2158D45@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Team AOC
subject: Holding the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Something is wrong with this picture.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211005-2575-header&t=1&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)
Something is wrong with this picture:
\- A $7.5 trillion defense spending bill over 10 years gets almost no debate and passes without anyone batting an eye.
\- Meanwhile, a budget reconciliation bill for less than half of that ($3.5 trillion over 10 years) which invests in people and saving the planet is “too expensive.”
It’s funny how members of Congress who are so concerned about the “deficit” will vote for record-high defense spending, and yet claim that money dedicated to things like universal pre-k, free community college, and Medicare expansion is too much.
It is imperative that we invest in supporting working families and saving our climate from further damage. That starts with passing the $3.5 trillion spending bill (also known as the Build Back Better Act).
Alexandria and her colleagues are holding the line to ensure that no one gets left behind in this bill, but your support would mean a lot right now:
**[Will you add your name today if you agree that anything less than $3.5 trillion for climate action, health care for seniors, child care, and more is unacceptable?**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/build-back-better-act/?source=em20211005-2575-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=2&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)
**[Sign now →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/build-back-better-act/?source=em20211005-2575-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=3&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)**
For the last three months, Alexandria and her colleagues have been clear: they won’t vote to pass the watered-down bipartisan infrastructure bill without passing the Build Back Better Act. Period.
It’s time for Congress to deliver on the priorities that voters elected them to fight for — not the bare minimum. That’s what Alexandria is laser-focused on.
At every turn, Alexandria has worked to call out the corporate interests fueling the resistance to this bill and the leaders in Washington who are doing their bidding and holding up the President’s plan.
[If you agree that we must show people what a Democratic majority can do for working families and pass this $3.5 trillion spending bill, please add your name now. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/build-back-better-act/?source=em20211005-2575-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=4&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)
Together, we will pass this bill and continue delivering for working people.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20211005-2575-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=5&refcode2=2575_2526796_ma7_1G&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211005-2575-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=6&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2575%2E2526796%2Ema7_1G)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: NH SENATE ALERT (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: Michael Flynn will be in NH tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Donald Trump's former National Security Advisor, Michael Flynn, will be in New Hampshire TOMORROW, friend. Make no mistake, this trip is part of Donald Trump and the GOP's plan to take back the Senate. name: Val Demings
subject: It'll go permanently RED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIYPsORDtdf5MFYUUfl_kKY1crlJ0f1AJ0z1yt2KMolt9h473N65FACLCX5Is3RvMzdUrlmYQ56MFYGE44XeaVGNrTN1eGZYwUwA5TGQVoNRCqM9jFxa6iOMwpVP1V9ZxGyZEJv7x5uAMTB8mxFm6qDMieTnBicspTJd1yMDhF5DFcC0RDWmqxwPIZHunKYesUju85O0bH9zeuJsPryMXJ2C2SXvXyoazUkVNdP92Z9NlsrBBRtOOqOvxsNzeeMN8i-EYvCEeYWM8NK91ylwE_I8/3fw/rWmY-5GfRIa6Q_m32LhKnA/h0/MP7hLw-W5z1iy9mZW-dCAWiYlOYjmJhwqGrhaiRrWJ0)
Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because **Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate.** [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIYPsORDtdf5MFYUUfl_kKY25XL5PJHzUFTcnTVQPLswihXD3xVwyqRuLI2PVz3XPtgXOmomVJfWuEZ6FbI7wo6sbJzxbVxHsdgcHxSNijQcLP02iof91nJT0mwFGxeyMYf3xypCd96A4vfmNbcThYcKdkNE-ov2loyhOaj5AiXLjiKIpX0mlYKdl3-6V3ZH83NzbLV1GMaP7sk6AytvftBQ21FKbz2VRY-YWBOV2yu3V-OqbXyefhwCj-bl121x-auVxUXYfA0B88ZYCdNqGfCc/3fw/rWmY-5GfRIa6Q_m32LhKnA/h1/b4uX7C4epdhImFE7_zsrJIWXqohQkx2aqXcLbJFR15M) I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought.

I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP _permanently_. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight.

**[So I have to ask you humbly and directly because outlets like CNN say my race could decide Senate control: will you split a donation of $25 or more between Common Good VA and my campaign to help me win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio? clean_body: Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought. I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP permanently. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight. I can't thank you enough for your support. Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Get it before it’s banned . . .
body:
Today, my book, LOOMERED: How I Became The Most Banned Woman In The World, was released on Amazon and Kindle.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YZM7632F4p9SCV96892Fmqqy2Q/6ywc7s90G3DBSOGhfEh0ew) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YZM7632F4p9SCV96892Fmqqy2Q/6ywc7s90G3DBSOGhfEh0ew) Today, my book, _LOOMERED: How I Became The Most Banned Woman In The World_ , was released on Amazon and Kindle.

You can [**get it there**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/vX763DqP763M8921Gia0VkK2eHBA/6ywc7s90G3DBSOGhfEh0ew) before crazy Leftists pressure Amazon to ban it, OR you can [**get a signed copy directly from me with a donation of $50 or more**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YZM7632F4p9SCV96892Fmqqy2Q/6ywc7s90G3DBSOGhfEh0ew).

I still have several copies left of my book that my publisher advanced to me for my friends and family, so if you donate today to fund my work, [**I can sign one of them and mail it out to you ASAP**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/YZM7632F4p9SCV96892Fmqqy2Q/6ywc7s90G3DBSOGhfEh0ew) - **and Jeff Bezos won 't get any wealthier!**

If you don't want to purchase the book from Amazon and prefer to wait until October 19th, that's when my book will be released and sold by other online retailers and vendors, including Barnes & Noble.

Thanks so much, and I hope you enjoy reading my book!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. If you do purchase my book from Amazon, please do me a favor and leave a review!

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

**Even if the countries participating in the Paris Climate Accords meet their carbon-reduction goals, climate change is still set to get _worse_ in the next decade.**
That’s the latest news from U.N. climate experts, Peter, and we _all_ need to pay attention.
It’s clear: If we’re going to save our planet for future generations, we must take even more drastic measures — starting right now.
As governor, Roy has prioritized expanding clean energy power and transitioning to a clean energy economy. But if we’re going to go further, we need Republicans to work with us and commit to reducing North Carolina’s carbon footprint.
That’s why we need to get input from folks in Englewood. **[Do you believe that Republicans should join our administration and take action against climate change?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37091485/310047533/-77977208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjcyMjUzNi0yODI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jD1giblOvJwrGi5FmqZFD8jZxReKPikbbBzjFRdyJc=&emci=8aa4692f-2826-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a2722536-2826-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: This is a survey about weed 🍃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Weed isn’t usually talked about on a campaign like ours. Let’s change that.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211005-2898-header&t=1&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)
To this day, most candidates shy away from making legal weed a central part of their platform. Even most Democrats! But John isn't exactly your cookie-cutter politician, Peter...
**John stands firm in his beliefs — just the way he _always_ has.** He's proud to be fighting for legal weed ✅, universal health care, LGBTQIA+ protection under law 🌈, the union way of life, second chances 🙏, racial justice, ending COVID 😷, raising the minimum wage, and beating climate change.
But today is about one issue in particular: We’re talking about legal weed.
John Fetterman understands that legal weed means more revenue, jobs, justice, and freedom. He sees how it will benefit our farmers, veterans, and small businesses. **And most of all, he sees it as a vital chance to expunge all bogus marijuana records and release every person incarcerated for using the plant.**
****[That’s why legal weed has always been a center-most issue to our campaign. We know it’s unusual, Peter — and that’s why we want to hear from you. Will you take a few seconds to take our survey and tell us: Do you agree with our strategy to keep legal weed a top campaign priority?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-weed-survey-202110/?source=em20211005-2898&t=2&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)****
[Do you agree with our strategy to keep legal weed as a top campaign priority?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-weed-survey-202110/?source=ema20211005-2898&t=3&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb) Select an issue: Agree Disagree Undecided **[Take the Survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-weed-survey-202110/?source=em20211005-2898&t=4&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)**
---
Most candidates don't make marijuana justice a top issue. But John has never been “most candidates.”
However — the issue is clear: Legal weed is supported by nearly 70% of Americans!
****[So tell us what you think, Peter! With your feedback, you can help elect John to the U.S. Senate, where he'll be one of the loudest (and tbh, probably the tallest) voices for legal weed in Pennsylvania and nationwide? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-weed-survey-202110/?source=em20211005-2898&t=5&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)****
We appreciate you weighing in, and we’ll loop back soon with the results! 👀
— Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211005-2898-footer&t=6&refcode2=2898_434096_YFrSGb&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2898%2E434096%2EYFrSGb)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

But John has never been “most candidates.” However — the issue is clear: Legal weed is supported by nearly 70% of Americans! We appreciate you weighing in, and we’ll loop back soon with the results! 👀 — Team Fetterman HQ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: We don’t see your name on this yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Last week, Pramila and her progressive colleagues in the House defied the odds and powerfully used their leverage to stop corporate America and a few conservative Democrats from moving forward with a small bill without President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act that invests in working families.
But we know that corporate America, Big Pharma, and the fossil fuel industry are still working around the clock to stop climate action and economic relief to the people. **That’s why it’s so important that we come together _now_ to show Pramila we still have her back 100% of the way.**
We're putting together a special card to show Pramila just how grateful we are for her continued fight for investments in working people, families, and our communities. [**Can you sign the card now and join us in thanking Pramila for everything she's done to hold the line and pass our progressive agenda?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pramila-2021-ty-card/?source=em-20211005&t=1&akid=696%2E420207%2EUIgZaR)
**[Sign the card »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pramila-2021-ty-card/?source=em-20211005&t=2&akid=696%2E420207%2EUIgZaR)**
It’s painfully obvious why Big Pharma, Wall Street, and Big Tech don’t want our priorities — priorities shared by President Biden — to pass. Our agenda passing means they’ll have to finally pay their fair share in taxes and have less profits to dole out to their ultra-rich CEOs.
**But Pramila knows the people are on her side.** They overwhelmingly support Medicare expansion, child care, bold climate action, investments in affordable housing, free community college, pre-k, and so much more. She’s not backing down — and we can’t either.
[**Click here to sign our thank you card to Pramila and join in solidarity with her efforts to hold the line for the passage of the transformative Build Back Better Act — you can even leave her a personal note!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pramila-2021-ty-card/?source=em-20211005&t=3&akid=696%2E420207%2EUIgZaR)
We know this will mean a lot to Pramila after her nonstop work for the people, so thanks for signing the card before we send it her way.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211005-696-footer&t=4&refcode2=696_420207_UIgZaR&akid=696%2E420207%2EUIgZaR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Please share your thoughts on the issues with Alex by taking our 30 second survey.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It means a lot to Alex and to all of us to know where you stand.
#

We’re reaching out to some of Alex’s top supporters today with a special request: [**Can you take a minute to tell us about the issues you care about the most? We’ll be reading the replies and passing the results on to Alex, so it would mean a lot if you would share your priorities with our team.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/October-Issue-Survey?source=em211005-1-subs&refcode2=375.159979.S0urG7&t=1&akid=375%2E159979%2ES0urG7)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/October-Issue-Survey?source=em211005-1-subs&refcode2=375.159979.S0urG7&t=2&akid=375%2E159979%2ES0urG7)**
We want to hear about the issues that motivate you to take action. Because at the end of the day, the issues are what will drive the success of our campaign.
Your input today will help Alex as he works in the Senate, and it will help us build a stronger campaign — one that’s focused on the priorities of our movement and that has what it takes to reach folks in every corner of the state and get them involved.
That’s why we are asking:
[**Please share your thoughts on the issues with Alex by taking our quick survey. Grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of our movement, so it’s important that we hear directly from you about your priorities.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/October-Issue-Survey?source=em211005-1-subs&refcode2=375.159979.S0urG7&t=3&akid=375%2E159979%2ES0urG7)
Thank you in advance for sharing your thoughts with us today. It means a lot to Alex and to all of us to know where you stand.
— Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/October-Issue-Survey?source=em211005-1-subs&refcode2=375.159979.S0urG7&t=4&akid=375%2E159979%2ES0urG7)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=375%2E159979%2ES0urG7)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8861%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nHleRAUolJEHXm%2fEcRSbbA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15640%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2f%2bhpfVTP249wl%2bSOpJcNA&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15641%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aR1ksb4JRBVHJEIUWzvepg&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15640%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2f%2bhpfVTP249wl%2bSOpJcNA&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15642%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O5qfk8gTNpkn8alOOv3o7w&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15643%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RSn%2feuq1ntwWdhc9C5twAg&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15644%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vTHgWtdF%2bu3s35BuRtoJ%2fg&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8861%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nHleRAUolJEHXm%2fEcRSbbA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8861%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=nHleRAUolJEHXm%2fEcRSbbA&sysid=1)

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Donald Trump isn't familiar with the 14th Amendment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
From campaign-style rallies to the formation of a new super PAC, Donald Trump is making it clear that he plans to run for president again in 2024. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37093430/310053260/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MzllZGY3LTJmMjYtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-3QLvDVk1IYS8IccSBGUooX_LoZAq3Fe6udMNCqWX10=&emci=0d716f81-2226-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=4739edf7-2f26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=16335001) Team,

From campaign-style rallies to the formation of a new super PAC, Donald Trump is making it clear that he plans to run for president again in 2024.

What he’s clearly not familiar with... is the 14th Amendment: "No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress, or elector of President and Vice-President, or hold any office, civil or military, under the United States, or under any State, who, having previously taken an oath, as a member of Congress, or as an officer of the United States, or as a member of any State legislature, or as an executive or judicial officer of any State, to support the Constitution of the United States, **shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the same** , or given aid or comfort to the enemies thereof." In short: **Trump should not be permitted to run for office because of his role in the January 6 insurrection.**

But we know that Trump has no regard for our Constitution or democracy, and he and his allies in Congress will use every trick in the book to ensure that he regains the presidency. We can't let that happen.

clean_body: From campaign-style rallies to the formation of a new super PAC, Donald Trump is making it clear that he plans to run for president again in 2024. Team, From campaign-style rallies to the formation of a new super PAC, Donald Trump is making it clear that he plans to run for president again in 2024. What he’s clearly not familiar with... is the 14th Amendment: "No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress, or elector of President and Vice-President, or hold any office, civil or military, under the United States, or under any State, who, having previously taken an oath, as a member of Congress, or as an officer of the United States, or as a member of any State legislature, or as an executive or judicial officer of any State, to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the same , or given aid or comfort to the enemies thereof." In short: Trump should not be permitted to run for office because of his role in the January 6 insurrection. But we know that Trump has no regard for our Constitution or democracy, and he and his allies in Congress will use every trick in the book to ensure that he regains the presidency. Team, this poll shows if the 2022 Nevada gubernatorial race was held today -- the outcome would be **within single digits.**
_Steve Sisolak is Nevada’s first Democratic Governor in twenty years,_ and National Republicans are determined to keep the progress he’s made short-lived.
They know this is a make-or-break swing state for the presidential election. If they can flip Nevada red in 2022 -- it will be smooth sailing for Trump’s 2024 run.
**Steve Sisolak has been a progressive champion for women’s rights, labor unions, environmental protections, and a public health insurance option.**

clean_body: | | | | | The first poll of the 2022 cycle was just released and it has Steve Sisolak neck-and-neck with Trump lackey Dean Heller. We have to show we’re ready to stand our ground. | | | Team, this poll shows if the 2022 Nevada gubernatorial race was held today -- the outcome would be within single digits. Steve Sisolak is Nevada’s first Democratic Governor in twenty years, and National Republicans are determined to keep the progress he’s made short-lived. They know this is a make-or-break swing state for the presidential election. If they can flip Nevada red in 2022 -- it will be smooth sailing for Trump’s 2024 run. Steve Sisolak has been a progressive champion for women’s rights, labor unions, environmental protections, and a public health insurance option. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Dick Durbin
subject: Before tomorrow’s hearing on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act?
#
Peter,
**The right to vote is sacred in a democracy.** Tomorrow, I will chair a full Senate Judiciary Committee hearing on protecting that right with the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.
The late John Lewis was one of the most extraordinary voting rights advocates our country has known. It is only fitting that we pass this legislation in his honor -- and that’s what I’m working toward in the Senate with tomorrow’s hearing. _But first, I want to hear from you, Peter:_
**[We need to use our voices as Americans and speak up for the right to vote. Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37093748/310054104/-2123832039?ms=dd_em_211005_1&refcode=dd_em_211005_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNhYzQyOS0zMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb34hfVVYa575fqk6TLYxszZ8lBOc5v8Azu8ZlvFdgY=&emci=3ff543b5-2d26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b0cac429-3126-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=2727974)**
Time after time, when Democrats have tried to protect voting rights, the GOP has stood in the way. But we can’t accept the status quo any longer -- not with the right to vote under attack.
This is a pivotal moment as we work toward passing this bill. Can I count on your support?
**[Sign on now if you’re with me: let’s protect the right to vote for every eligible American.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37093749/310054105/-2123832039?ms=dd_em_211005_1&refcode=dd_em_211005_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNhYzQyOS0zMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb34hfVVYa575fqk6TLYxszZ8lBOc5v8Azu8ZlvFdgY=&emci=3ff543b5-2d26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b0cac429-3126-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37093750/310054106/-2123832039?ms=dd_em_211005_1&refcode=dd_em_211005_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNhYzQyOS0zMTI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb34hfVVYa575fqk6TLYxszZ8lBOc5v8Azu8ZlvFdgY=&emci=3ff543b5-2d26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b0cac429-3126-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=2727974)**

name: Shawn Collins
subject: America needs new leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA**
body:
I personally survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts while serving in Afghanistan. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=70d742d2ebde4209bbd16607d86436a6&_e=F1Mqi30-8ZqCPZ9EZYGZQhx-Evl5xUO6-ls2KKDCdWEmpjbZImsBrMmHpnpBX4AXZ6wAS6pnZn8a-XgNBBv3SHHCRuv2aCxI1fk79JGvpjF9lRhy4LXU1fmL87NbjWXCGyu4E0q9G-ooDWzianit_ndmWGzyffFGTc2QTFAwqKKgVKtsRXR0suJRTv_lm5Mbe2ABBLQWqN1oGDwNp_1VhJzUjKUXD6W3rHGxhToTpANG9tVAWb2VLXCCkXqeEV6RJq3M997C7s2CCJ7ORq-njCzyhv3UYgbEHnF8aWpyMlXRuoRAbYjIFietTsBeYZwBSKB64bDrHsPVXFI2Q8-EH9rdUQyJrgpIkmlb4aRKJe8yl18ZLKKUmeTQOVaVNvo9TwjuBWes4za4PvYQ20JSJIadeJKlU95ELWbu7bgXU8AtyQZ5dBzehRl1VskiGXGaJhB0C7rvL6nlBYJuvu2d_GUVNc1ud-q4QQGs9ehXue_eqiO0TRtnUcalBp_7tLeA)

---
Fellow patriot,

As a proud United States Navy veteran who served a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan, I am beyond appalled at what has happened.

I and thousands of other American men and women – not to mention thousands of allied troops – left our homes and our families behind to put our lives on the line fighting for stability and against terrorism in that country, all in order to keep our home country safe.

I personally survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts while serving in Afghanistan. I was lucky to make it home. Sadly, far too many of the men and women I served alongside did not make it home. Thousands made the ultimate sacrifice and laid down their lives in Afghanistan to keep America safe from more terrorist attacks.
**
Now, everything we fought and died for over the past twenty years has been wiped away and all been for nothing, and it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and flat out refused to acknowledge the possibility – and I say the inevitability – that the Taliban would retake the country after our troops were pulled out.**

**I lay this travesty entirely at President Biden’s feet.**

This is an embarrassment, a disgrace, disaster, and the ultimate insult to the thousands of men and women, along with their families, whose deaths are now in vain.

**President Biden has failed.** He has failed those who died, their families, our veterans, our military, the Americans who are still stuck there – **he has failed America.**

My deepest thoughts and prayers go out to all the people President Biden has failed. But I know we need to do so much more.

[**This failure is exactly why we need new leadership in Washington, D.C..**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=70d742d2ebde4209bbd16607d86436a6&_e=F1Mqi30-8ZqCPZ9EZYGZQhx-Evl5xUO6-ls2KKDCdWEmpjbZImsBrMmHpnpBX4AXZ6wAS6pnZn8a-XgNBBv3SHHCRuv2aCxI1fk79JGvpjF9lRhy4LXU1fmL87NbjWXCGyu4E0q9G-ooDWzianit_ndmWGzyffFGTc2QTFAwqKKgVKtsRXR0suJRTv_lm5Mbe2ABBLQWqN1oGDwNp_1VhJzUjKUXD6W3rHGxhToTpANG9tVAWb2VLXCCkXqeEV6RJq3M997C7s2CCJ7ORq-njKHZQEcD_7ztN65AT664zG0l7ODnS2qVx1jqaa347rzCqPrTEyFhwPMFcDezl9bcfrH5yEZZxsMnNmNulu9vGF94SgzP3wIvZhMlhnau6hUhahUFc86OHxp__1s1OrPpqOaPBETP0SpSH3DNBWjdWEcnR_stH08LkEe5uyW4NNOV2n-UM-SJYSE0IphwKR3TNW7Sjng-YT6LRXb3VdKHI6qUR3FH7kuMu8VKZKjTvR1G)

Neither President Biden nor Nancy Pelosi ever served in the military, so they can’t possibly even fathom what this feels like to veterans like me who fought in Afghanistan.

I spent my life fighting for the Constitution that I swore to uphold and defend. I fought to keep my country free and safe. I made the choice to run for Congress in California’s 45th District because I wanted to continue fighting for those things and more... clearly, we desperately need people who will, because our current leaders won’t.

**For the sake of our country and the world, we need new leadership in America.** We need leaders who will honor and respect our military and law enforcement and all they do to protect us. We need leaders who love America and are proud patriots. We need leaders who will unite us rather than divide us. We need leaders who will make and keep America and Americans everywhere strong and safe.

[**I am going to continue fighting with everything I have in me to hold our leaders accountable for what they’ve done and give our nation and our people the strong leadership we desperately need. I hope I can count on patriots like you to stand beside me in this fight.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=70d742d2ebde4209bbd16607d86436a6&_e=F1Mqi30-8ZqCPZ9EZYGZQhx-Evl5xUO6-ls2KKDCdWEmpjbZImsBrMmHpnpBX4AXZ6wAS6pnZn8a-XgNBBv3SHHCRuv2aCxI1fk79JGvpjF9lRhy4LXU1fmL87NbjWXCGyu4E0q9G-ooDWzianit_ndmWGzyffFGTc2QTFAwqKKgVKtsRXR0suJRTv_lm5Mbe2ABBLQWqN1oGDwNp_1VhJzUjKUXD6W3rHGxhToTpANG9tVAWb2VLXCCkXqeEV6RJq3M997C7s2CCJ7ORq-njM4fycqW8-LmCLFYXuGuPD6sq6wRvDoJwOzuUEUeAIQPgrtPQKcFkrMlH5LzZPgCmm5KnDjSpoPy4es2LDDQsV1qZGMqSwBRfjLStymezOvPNgGyINNnF08Ofas4h_X7sCUKobD3bcr7DZGz8XUlYGezHrB_WQrbgipY9O50FDHceYaACJAfnNaijw5fuP56zePoZwn668BFEmqSdvQeEbNcdgK7cmt_8NVTC5PI3JpS)

clean_body: I personally survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts while serving in Afghanistan. | Fellow patriot, As a proud United States Navy veteran who served a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan, I am beyond appalled at what has happened. I and thousands of other American men and women – not to mention thousands of allied troops – left our homes and our families behind to put our lives on the line fighting for stability and against terrorism in that country, all in order to keep our home country safe. I personally survived two suicide bomb assassination attempts while serving in Afghanistan. I was lucky to make it home. Sadly, far too many of the men and women I served alongside did not make it home. Thousands made the ultimate sacrifice and laid down their lives in Afghanistan to keep America safe from more terrorist attacks. Now, everything we fought and died for over the past twenty years has been wiped away and all been for nothing, and it’s all because President Biden underestimated our enemy and flat out refused to acknowledge the possibility – and I say the inevitability – that the Taliban would retake the country after our troops were pulled out. I lay this travesty entirely at President Biden’s feet. This is an embarrassment, a disgrace, disaster, and the ultimate insult to the thousands of men and women, along with their families, whose deaths are now in vain. President Biden has failed. He has failed those who died, their families, our veterans, our military, the Americans who are still stuck there – he has failed America. My deepest thoughts and prayers go out to all the people President Biden has failed. But I know we need to do so much more. Neither President Biden nor Nancy Pelosi ever served in the military, so they can’t possibly even fathom what this feels like to veterans like me who fought in Afghanistan. I spent my life fighting for the Constitution that I swore to uphold and defend. I fought to keep my country free and safe. I made the choice to run for Congress in California’s 45th District because I wanted to continue fighting for those things and more... clearly, we desperately need people who will, because our current leaders won’t. For the sake of our country and the world, we need new leadership in America. We need leaders who will honor and respect our military and law enforcement and all they do to protect us. We need leaders who love America and are proud patriots. We need leaders who will unite us rather than divide us. We need leaders who will make and keep America and Americans everywhere strong and safe. For America, Shawn Collins U.S. Navy veteran Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473900:JlWwrI2zN:m:1:3253819041:E9ED8D9C75A5FBAC6A93AFF489FD0373:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473900:JlWwrI2zN:m:1:3253819041:E9ED8D9C75A5FBAC6A93AFF489FD0373:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58473900:JlWwrI2zN:m:1:3253819041:E9ED8D9C75A5FBAC6A93AFF489FD0373:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. clean_body: Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm. It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the Young America 's Foundation (YAF). When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --and won. But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. Young America 's Foundation has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses exclusively through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here's why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News'sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation. That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Let's audit Pima County
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
How many votes will we uncover there? |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=76dbeede08&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump-endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona and I am the proud patriot who led the vanguard in uncovering heinous crimes against America in the Maricopa Audit.

**But the media has lied about, manipulated, and hidden the data from the American Public. I will not let this happen.**

_In fact, now is the time to press forward, not the time to hide. [Now is the time to take drastic next steps to make sure that this electoral TRAGEDY never happens again!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1eb2b66233&e=44b8c466b0)_

**This is why I have started a very important petition to audit Pima County – the second largest county in Arizona and another source of huge fraud on election night!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f1ea816b4a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| We have well over 33,000 signatures now, and we expect that we will hit our 500,000 in a month. But this is a huge effort – one well justified.

Here are just a few reasons that an audit of Pima county is critical to election integrity:
* There was a report to the DOJ that 35,000 fictitious votes had been inserted into the election in Pima County
* Pima County is the second largest county and protecting the ballot – especially – in populated areas – is a legislative responsibility.
* Pima County showed significant disruption of historical voting patterns similar to those found in Maricopa County
* Personally, many Pima County residents have reported to me directly that they received more than one ballot in the mail.

**Because of these things, it is my duty to call on the Arizona Legislature to conduct a forensic audit of Pima County!**

Why? Because we don’t just have the evidence of the crime scene, we have the whole thing.

We not only have the smoking gun, we know where the crime scene was committed, we know the victim, and we even know the perpetrator of the crime.

**And this is where I need your help. This is a massive endeavor – and we can grant evil no quarter, no refuge, no place to hide. Which is why I need your continued support.**
*****AUDIT PIMA*****
[_Please continue to support America’s Audit in Arizona with a generous donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more! We must Audit Pima!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=03022c5655&e=44b8c466b0)

I want to leave you with a promise. As we push forward in the trenches in this Arizona Audit, as we push to uncover all of the misdeeds and midnight crimes of the Democrats, it can be easy to lose focus on how far we have come and what we are trying to do.

**Through a coordinated effort of Arizona Patriots, American Conservatives, and donors like you, we have rallied together a huge effort to show without a shadow of a doubt that the Democrats have been caught – red-handed.**

But the Fake News Media is protecting them, as they always do, and we need to push forward to make sure the Song of Liberty is sung above the mayhem of Fake News propaganda. And we need to take over the Secretary of State offices, those who control the elections, to lock down and protect our elections in the future – not just the present.

**And this is what I will do as Secretary of State. **

**_Never again will the Democrats steal an election from the Republicans. Never again will Arizona’s proud electors be falsely used against the wishes of the Arizona People. Arizona is a Red State. I will make sure it stays that way._**

[_Please support my campaign with a rush donation today of just $25, $50, or $100 to ensure that our electoral system is protected from the wiles of the radical left!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7a6812045d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=495b5c3658&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b261d31f2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=369029f49d&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=48162c34b6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=48162c34b6).

**[Read Kim's new op-ed in the Hill>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37095366/310058517/-706170592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgxMDA1Yy0zODI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB8-D0HMQ5OCezTQmm1wR-5bDkeylzXv8pWmYMMf1Nc=&emci=19147a14-fd25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=cf81005c-3826-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)**
---
Peter,

As a pediatrician, congresswoman, and parent herself, Kim hears concerns from parents about COVID-19 and the return to school on a daily basis. Parents are worried. The COVID-19 pandemic is surging in many states, and it’s coinciding with the return to school for students across the country.

Since the start of the school year, cases among children have accelerated. A recent report from the American Academy of Pediatrics showed there were more than 250,000 new cases of COVID-19 added in the first week of September. Over 5 million children have tested positive so far, and more than 460 have died.

This should set off fire alarms for policymakers at all levels of government, parents, and school administrators — about implications for the children themselves and for their communities.

In order to keep our schools open, our children safely in school, and parents at work, we need to put politics aside and use all the tools at our disposal to get past this pandemic. That's why Kim is working to expand rapid testing to slow the spread of the Delta variant.

**[Read Kim's op-ed in _The Hill_ now to learn more about the work she's doing to keep our children, educators, and communities safe >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37095367/310058518/-706170592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjgxMDA1Yy0zODI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FB8-D0HMQ5OCezTQmm1wR-5bDkeylzXv8pWmYMMf1Nc=&emci=19147a14-fd25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=cf81005c-3826-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)**

Team Schrier
