name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Rebuked by Courts Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Taking the Initiative](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorl3cZaAqffikOvBHQd0HbkM3pQvPXhG88XP8so6fD8KA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_5sdf&n=1) Another California law has been ruled unconstitutional. With AB 32, Newsom and the Legislature tried to force ICE to close its detention facilities. Today the 9th Circuit held this violates the Supremacy Clause. Next year, Newsom and the legislators who passed this law will face voters. Perhaps more importantly, several transformative initiatives will be on the ballot. The [full list](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=zxJBdFO2LZRu4lDamvUPFhwBA-ts7btnIExY3uyIgX7puPZ6Fxm_R0hgLVE6ufXL6RENF-gzqMPH9CeYQ750MBuyaRAm6ry95vu5AElP5ZY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_5sdf&n=2) of initiatives soon gathering signatures for the 2022 election includes:
* **School Choice**. Let funding follow the child based on parental choice
* **Water Storage**. End the era of shorter showers and fallow fields
* **Death Tax Repeal**. Restore a protection of Prop. 13
* **Election Integrity**. Require voter ID
* **Taxpayer Protection**. Require voter approval for tax increases
* **Anti-Corruption**. End government union collective bargaining
* **Accurate Ballots**. Assure accurate descriptions of Propositions

Our movement is creating a new landscape of political possibility, and the fight for California's future has only just begun. [Help me fight for California at the Capitol](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_5sdf&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwMKsieF2W6rN9ZOPLZlhfHZK64RcyjV81x6zI13J7qBQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_5sdf&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_5sdf&n=5)California Legislator

subject: We're expanding our volunteer outreach program -- again!
body:
New canvasses in Chillicothe, Commerical Point, Logan, McConnelsville, and Wilmington! | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Hi ,

Voting in the 2021 Special Election is officially underway! We have just 27 days left to flip the 15th and send Allison to Congress. **_The ONLY way to win this race is by talking to voters in every single corner of this district. _**

We need volunteers to help us kick-off canvassing in 5 new locations this weekend! RSVP now to knock on doors in:
* [Chillicothe](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b1dcd7dc57&e=400a181d5a)
* [Commercial Point](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bfc71be9f9&e=400a181d5a)
* [Logan](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2b1f4bd98b&e=400a181d5a)
* [McConnelsville](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0fd46b85a9&e=400a181d5a)
* [Wilmington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7b59f2b127&e=400a181d5a)

|

---
### RSVP: [Knock on Doors with Mayor Nan Whaley](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=571de3b62f&e=400a181d5a)
Join us this Sunday, Oct. 10th at 11:30am to hear from special guest Mayor Nan Whaley to knock on doors and talk to our neighbors about the special election for Ohio’s 15th Congressional district.

Join your brothers and sisters in the Ohio AFL-CIO for a district-wide Day of Action in support of Allison Russo! _All allies of labor welcome!_

| | Dear Friend, Florida’s very own Ron DeSantis has called for an investigation into the Big Tech tyrants for violating Florida’s election laws. It was never a secret that Silicon Valley has used its power to censor and discredit patriots across the country. **I’m proud to see conservatives here in the great state of Florida taking a stand against Big Tech.** Like Governor DeSantis, I will always fight the radical left’s attempt to censor Americans and meddle in our elections. **Will you sign my petition standing against Big Tech censorship?**

clean_body: Florida’s very own Ron DeSantis has called for an investigation into the Big Tech tyrants for violating Florida’s... | | | | | Dear Friend, Florida’s very own Ron DeSantis has called for an investigation into the Big Tech tyrants for violating Florida’s election laws. It was never a secret that Silicon Valley has used its power to censor and discredit patriots across the country. I’m proud to see conservatives here in the great state of Florida taking a stand against Big Tech. Like Governor DeSantis, I will always fight the radical left’s attempt to censor Americans and meddle in our elections. Will you sign my petition standing against Big Tech censorship? | "FIGHT BIG TECH CENSORSHIP" | | | Silicon Valley is the left’s largest donor and blatantly pushes their radical agenda by selectively censoring conservatives while allowing liberals to spread misinformation at will. body:
We are up against one of the biggest political machines in the country | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8szbrfeJiWYEes6PDvl2gxkoxrDbkx0BR7jVuB8pQhgTlsdB_zQnC5z2A2nWBi6NJPhJKGDJLi6CDPIn9pzn0xOXexDKnLaqX1ObbyjnFRa2L2d4ehzaGjqRFtudTQD_fRovXzWuPMqya179QbC9GwMaSH4es2W3QHgd23DdETIt2FcuOgRwoCKWLlPTp5oPsCh_oKwv76XU6OZadcX1rmsuoVRVCHgGeCaGe-mG_CGuA/3fw/0wnesOaHTqmUlQEBpITNwQ/h0/2fwo9mOW3gPjTK8L0qc3OL2ewl6iP2Z_RRCAw30UUEg)
Hey team, When it comes to politics, there is no place like home. In Chicago, we are up against one of the biggest political machines in the country, but we know that they take their power for granted, and the people want and deserve something better. I am running for Congress because we cannot proceed with business as usual, and the people in IL-7 know exactly that. All we have to do is make sure that every voter in this district knows they have a choice. We need to make sure they know that this seat belongs to them - not any one Chicago politician. We, the people, can say no to the status quo, choose new leadership, and elect a true champion for our community. **In order to make that happen we need the biggest people powered, volunteer led campaign Chicago has ever seen.**[**Can you sign up to be part of our volunteer team?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDH-j9WFsnX43JAE2icxSrd96OaCuhojbra51QD28qwv-Oiee8YMLv_G-8VfL6Dxim7aZ6sdAFZWWy2OcNZ8hgFjkRutdxwAgm9knFZeBSoU3Jv3U-5FwawivYwsOcoIfOc5o5LlEVAibyXqLX0rv2iJJgMc_NC7T5yW0uzuMXh5HFA_t_mzd3RA-H-lwu7kCQteEUUl7yAdm1lLuODjW9rgSA0GiIXq7-ioHAmb9Hq3GaxPJroxTeCYO40o2UGJc32t_G7D9P-twj_LCoa9N5cw/3fw/0wnesOaHTqmUlQEBpITNwQ/h1/HnIEmwSZe5-A-214v2fRwAtq02A_r6N3VjVofYdgZn0) Our campaign is starting our field operation early and we are doing that because our plan is to make 1,000,000 voter contacts between phone calls, doors knocked, texts sent, and relational organizing. I know we can hit this goal and make sure every voter in IL-7 knows they could have a representative who is ready to fight for them every day. [**Will you be part of our people powered movement?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDH-j9WFsnX43JAE2icxSrd96OaCuhojbra51QD28qwv-pRYdHaFE5X1r28qddTh1x4xIgvLRVd1tegQSqtNQeCa3EFR6e-3TXoM32ttslbBZMCMx8d16vvpkS38h2i-6aBfIwh9nD0th7BTOSOu-phDeXBm2r0C5s2GDDQdwtxv8q7NFD0GiPA6lVkWKqP9Bzu7O8ZV2yXJK2AFVIxvPnkrNV9_i8yAehfSm36Qw_4lmlfKlaDp87gwUTjGJJ1HxsakqdkJ0czGLxe986PZn2Z8/3fw/0wnesOaHTqmUlQEBpITNwQ/h2/6kS1fUIkopLsVKYv9dQCekJmc6zUGCr35NE1ENC8hiU) In solidarity, Kina
[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvCmYnnW-6I0oaLoxnMYHNBtfCMc8MElj_R9J3sgrgmO6ozuaTzo_rQLzV_a7waH3PjnmT4YIz39gMlJm_DPm73OVs2eibKt7tBBWxSeIkhX_3WaIVZTepWRrC2-CzgVUUKjWDx8K0XkNPqr6AYHflOmxodJXJjIJv3hNTzVIiipF0RhG3mNUhCGeSyQgYa_KrPsiGcl0DXZ-JLTMZQhsE8YXPZ_cwgSYocAcTTyWZMxN5j2fbuXPBikxUEc8AQ-eXsDITUURtHnKk0rM84Dd0APi6bsGb-Mg9eVcFGus93hI/3fw/0wnesOaHTqmUlQEBpITNwQ/h3/hcXmyQdsoFfTFSfC20hU_keN7fh3u4YkdYgVrSnG8-U) | To give by check:

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: $25 could change the course of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5026?t=1006&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]A personal message from Terry McAuliffe

Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 -- it’s a statistical
TIE, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking
up a big win before next year’s midterm.

My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75
million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office.

Youngkin’s a GOP extremist -- he was caught on video pledging to defund
Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+,
anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been
endorsed by Donald Trump FOUR times.

So you can imagine how confused I am about why more people aren’t stepping
up and donating. We’re blowing this one, friend.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5026?t=1007&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Early voting has already begun, and we need to turn things around
immediately. Will you step up and split a donation between my campaign and
Tim Ryan’s campaign for Senate right now?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5026?t=1008&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5027?t=1009&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5028?t=1010&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5029?t=1011&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5030?t=1012&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5026?t=1013&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ]Other Amount

I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us and outspend us.
This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy.

-- Terry

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=1076%2E3611125%2ETvRIRl ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Following up on your questions for Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

A few weeks back, we reached out and asked if you had any questions for
Beto. Nearly 2,000 folks reached out
with questions – ranging from book recommendations to questions on how to
defend our democracy.

After going through every question, our team picked out some of our
favorites for Beto to answer. You can read some of his answers below!
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47025?refcode=ema20211005-156870&t=1001&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]But first, if you can, please consider making a donation of
$3 or more today to fund the important work that Beto
outlines in his answers.

How do I get trained to help register voters for future elections?

Texas was already the toughest state in which to register to vote and cast
a ballot, and with the recent passage of the SB 1 voter suppression bill,
it’s only become harder. By getting certified as a [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46615?t=1002&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]Volunteer Deputy
Registrar (VDR), you can make the process easier for folks by registering
voters in your community – and help us take back our state in 2022.

I encourage you to [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46615?t=1003&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]click here to find all the information you need to
become a VDR in your county. And then I hope you will consider joining our
team of [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47015?t=1004&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]Powered by People Ambassadors – our statewide team of over
1,000 VDRs who have registered about a quarter-million Texans to vote in
just the past year and a half. You can [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47015?t=1005&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]click here to learn how to
become an Ambassador with us.

What are you reading these days? Any good books to recommend?

I am reading Woody Guthrie’s “Bound for Glory” to my son Henry.

How are donations spent in this organization?

Donations from our supporters help ensure we have a steady stream of
resources to register, engage, and turn out the voters who will make the
difference in 2022 – everything from voting rights rallies to phone banks
to in-person canvasses and voter registration events. Donations also allow
us to support exciting Democratic candidates and organizers in Texas, who
are helping bring about the change we want to see in Texas.

Powered by People volunteers are doing this work in some of the toughest,
hardest to reach areas with some of the lowest turnout rates in the entire
country. Take Laredo, for example: like other communities along the
border, voter turnout in Laredo was just about 50% in 2020. Instead of
hiring a bunch of political analysts to tell us why people down there
aren’t voting, we’re reaching out and asking the voters themselves.
Through phone banks, deep canvassing, and having these conversations
one-on-one, we’ve learned a lot about what issues matter most to folks,
and what it’s going to take for them to vote in the future. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47016?t=1006&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]You can
read a recent Laredo Morning Times article about our Laredo-based
volunteers here.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47025?refcode=ema20211005-156870&t=1007&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]Like Beto said, action is the antidote to despair. And donations from our
supporters help ensure we are able to support our volunteers in taking
action. So please, make a donation of $3 today to fund this
important work ahead of 2022.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47025?refcode=ema20211005-156870&amount=3&t=1026&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]Contribute $3

We hope that Beto’s answers to your questions help inspire you on a path
of action ahead of the 2022 midterms. This work couldn’t be more urgent,
and every donation you can give or hour you spend making calls helps make
a huge difference in our mission to flip Texas blue and defend our
democracy.

Thanks again for your support. We’ll be sending out
another round of Beto’s answers soon!

–Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47025?refcode=ema20211005-156870&t=1027&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=156870%2E444211%2ECO1JvJ

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Take Laredo, for example: like other communities along the border, voter turnout in Laredo was just about 50% in 2020. Instead of hiring a bunch of political analysts to tell us why people down there aren’t voting, we’re reaching out and asking the voters themselves. Through phone banks, deep canvassing, and having these conversations one-on-one, we’ve learned a lot about what issues matter most to folks, and what it’s going to take for them to vote in the future. [ ]You can read a recent Laredo Morning Times article about our Laredo-based volunteers here. [ ]Like Beto said, action is the antidote to despair. And donations from our supporters help ensure we are able to support our volunteers in taking action. So please, make a donation of $3 today to fund this important work ahead of 2022. [ ]Contribute $3 We hope that Beto’s answers to your questions help inspire you on a path of action ahead of the 2022 midterms. This work couldn’t be more urgent, and every donation you can give or hour you spend making calls helps make a huge difference in our mission to flip Texas blue and defend our democracy. Thanks again for your support. We’ll be sending out another round of Beto’s answers soon! –Powered by People [ ]Donate »

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: quick update on our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
this is short →
| |
---
| | Hey Derek, I just wanted to send around a quick update on our progress toward tomorrow’s fundraising goal, because we’re starting to run out of time here.

I’ll be blunt: it’s not great.

We’re over halfway through our three-day timeline for this goal, but unfortunately, we still have a long way to our goal.

We’re going to have to really pick up the pace here if we’re going to hit $500,000 by midnight tomorrow, and I’m hoping you’ll help us get there.

So what do you say? Will you chip in right now? You can use this link to make a secure contribution right away: _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trm_2021_em?refcode=20211005.8_TM_10AL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37098815/310088166/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.8_TM_10AL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2U5NTM0Yy00ZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=od2CGp-38d_myv07XJxeEeVDOckohhO2B8lLCzHUj34=)**_

Look, I know it’s a lot to ask. But we’re not just doing this to prove the experts wrong about Democratic enthusiasm — we’re doing this because it’s the only way we’ll be able to stop my right-wing extremist opponent from rolling back progress in Virginia.

_**It’s the only way we’ll be able to block Donald Trump’s 2024 comeback.**_

And it’s the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the future of Virginia.

_**[I need you with me, Derek{else}}: please chip in whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37098816/310088169/-2023814932?refcode=20211005.8_TM_10AL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2U5NTM0Yy00ZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=od2CGp-38d_myv07XJxeEeVDOckohhO2B8lLCzHUj34=)**_

Let’s do this,

Terry
_If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a1e81d45-7625-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/0ce9534c-4d26-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2U5NTM0Yy00ZDI2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=od2CGp-38d_myv07XJxeEeVDOckohhO2B8lLCzHUj34=&id=108609855)._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Today I Took Action to Protect Our Children from Vaccine Passports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Today, as Acting Governor, I fixed Gov. Little's Executive Order on "vaccine passports" to make sure that K-12 schools and universities cannot require | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/eo-10-05-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d79d3c2375&e=823fa8e224)
---
| |
## Today I Took Action to Protect Our Children from Vaccine Passports!
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| Today, as Acting Governor, I took a major step to fix Gov. Little's Executive Order on "vaccine passports". My new Executive Order eliminates the loopholes and clarifies that there will be NO vaccine mandates or mandatory testing in our K-12 schools and universities. I will never stop fighting to protect and preserve your Individual Liberty!
---
|
---
|
## Help Protect Individual Liberty!
---
| It is clear Idaho is facing an array of threats like never before. From the invasion taking place on our southern border to the push for vaccine mandates, vaccine passports, and other tyrannical measures to control your personal health decisions, Idahoans across the state know their Liberty is under attack. I believe it is contrary to the principles of a free society for anyone to face prejudice or discrimination for their personal medical decisions, and I am doing everything I can to keep this from happening in Idaho. I'm running for Idaho Governor to **_Make Idaho Free Again_** and to restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. **Will you help protect Individual Liberty in Idaho?**
---
| [Yes, I will help!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9e37226ae3&e=823fa8e224 "Yes, I will help!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=4b861c3e9b&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3493e5d9eb&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7790f5bf72&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=66a4f9838f&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9835256fd5&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---

And _CNN_ is now calling Nevada a top pickup opportunity for Republicans, with _The Cook Political Report_ _downgrading_ my chances of defending this seat.

The Senate Republican’s campaign arm just raised another $28 million that they could dump into battleground states like Nevada to flip the Senate for Mitch McConnell – and I’m already being outspent by GOP outside groups: more than $1 million has been spent in attack ads to defeat me.

**[Nevada could decide control of the Senate, and Mitch McConnell is all in on flipping my seat, Derek. body:
The fight for the Senate is well underway, and we need YOUR input to WIN BACK the majority. The fight for the Senate is well underway, and we need YOUR input to WIN BACK the majority. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ff1646ef9e354787ba694dbf6e1406ea&_e=iEunQr2Eg2SwzQi7Dt2QmVcDMADQqcL9ywlY8_nS51fc-8-lVy-BamX6_m1NE3Pc9d8Muo88nZ7VAsGq548n6agFjIwjfVefZCceBrhq-gxMww3DvzTFeMeyTjH0eJRpDzYM62DWqT9kEwyIbX5Wg4STnUg3V42B3iU7RPhuG0Jn_SusTUcXjIbH-A5_f62AzTg-1Mb3p6ktCCrV-_tarA1GiFYSgQ2WFZKYFz5KSEhg-ZKUDcf-lplwqxoQLYuKg-cMEKimBt6r0BWrlixSBIlBcVmKbaPXMGEAEJ56Cra2-WDFPFxAMsj-d2MOf8gDd2vlSD6AI8DDfs01dp6ry3I1EinfSN0mH-L8eh_q-puM2T4qwoe-T29PCOvxxaEsilMSHNRroDb4hICI5PUxt2y2JI8yB2ggl8VdSFvxclg_PG_8saQ_iOdoPkSHQhcojR4zvbq_un6hspfkCldGOEKUNrO-jj3jdUEnRbyJRhu0NHX8ooeRmGMcBYfXI8QZSOchnjbnwSxRQEEC0cPyqSbksC2A3BgPrdO9LmTQdxhEOL7BeaGZcK7QZ_UqM4X18x2V5-pWlyMfADiNLgKVPQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

We only launched our Senate campaign six weeks ago, but make no mistake - the battle for the Senate majority has been underway for months.

name: bob@mark4ohio.com bob@mark4ohio.com
subject: Mark Pukita Zoom Town Hall On Wednesday, October 6th, @ NOON!!
body:
Hey, Patriot!

Are you glad that you don't have Rob Portman as your Senate candidate choice in 2022? Would you like to meet the candidate that was willing to primary him- and take him on? Would you like to be able to vote for a fighter, not a Swamp creature?

This is your invite to come **meet Mark Pukita** Wednesday, October 6 at noon- on ZOOM or on your phone- **right from the comfort of your home.** If you have already met Mark and agree that he IS THE CANDIDATE, please share this and invite others. Let's make patriotism cool again!

<https://us02web.zoom.us/j/8272648268>
Meeting ID: 827 264 8268
One tap mobile
+13126266799,,8272648268# US (Chicago)

God bless America and draw her back to her roots and Him, 🇺🇸

Linda Kelly
Region Lead****

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: This is what we’re up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We don’t have a moment to slow down.
#
This just in: **a new Republican challenger has just joined the U.S. Senate race in North Carolina**. That’s right, this race just got _even more_ crowded and competitive. [**_Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign today so we can have the resources we need to defeat our Republican opponents and elect Erica Smith?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19141?t=1&akid=524%2E3698%2EIOg-7-)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19147?refcode=em20211005-524&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=524%2E3698%2EIOg-7-)**
**CNN has ALREADY ranked our U.S. Senate seat as one of the top 10 most likely to flip in 2022**.
There’s a lot on the line. Extremist Republicans like Madison Cawthorn are literally calling for WAR, yes war, against “tyranny.”1 He already spoke at the January 6 insurrection and threatened “bloodshed” over any future elections that the Republican party claims are rigged.2
Meanwhile, Democrats in Congress are struggling to pass critical progressive legislation. It’s abundantly clear that we NEED that 51st YES vote. Erica will proudly be that 51st YES vote on urgent reproductive justice and student debt cancellation legislation, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and more.
We’ll be honest, while our Republican opponents can depend on super PAC money, corporate $$$, and fossil-fuel funds — **we don’t take a dime**. We’re entirely dependent on small-dollar grassroots donations.
That’s why it’s so critical in moments like this that we receive donations from folks like you so we can continue to be prepared to run a scrappy, bold, progressive campaign. [**_If you’re in a place to, can you donate $ 5 today so we can prepare to meet the GOP with the full-strength of our moral movement behind us?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19141?t=21&akid=524%2E3698%2EIOg-7-)
Onwards,
Team Erica Smith
1 - [Amee Vanderpool Tweet](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19150?t=22&akid=524%2E3698%2EIOg-7-)
2 - [MSNBC](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19151?t=23&akid=524%2E3698%2EIOg-7-)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211005-524-footer&t=24&refcode2=524_3698_IOg-7-&akid=524%2E3698%2EIOg-7-)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: We don’t have a moment to slow down. This just in: a new Republican challenger has just joined the U.S. Senate race in North Carolina. That’s right, this race just got even more crowded and competitive. - - CNN has ALREADY ranked our U.S. Senate seat as one of the top 10 most likely to flip in 2022. There’s a lot on the line. Extremist Republicans like Madison Cawthorn are literally calling for WAR, yes war, against “tyranny.”1 He already spoke at the January 6 insurrection and threatened “bloodshed” over any future elections that the Republican party claims are rigged.2 Meanwhile, Democrats in Congress are struggling to pass critical progressive legislation. It’s abundantly clear that we NEED that 51st YES vote. Erica will proudly be that 51st YES vote on urgent reproductive justice and student debt cancellation legislation, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and more. We’ll be honest, while our Republican opponents can depend on super PAC money, corporate $$$, and fossil-fuel funds — we don’t take a dime. We’re entirely dependent on small-dollar grassroots donations. That’s why it’s so critical in moments like this that we receive donations from folks like you so we can continue to be prepared to run a scrappy, bold, progressive campaign. - Onwards, Team Erica Smith 1 - - 2 - - - Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Prayer & Action for HB 25 to "Save Girl's Sports"
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8e36f75f583a/prayer-action-for-texas-house-to-save-girls-sports-14818186?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=efd9c8e3dc&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
Click the above image to watch and share a short video message from Dixie Carroll.
| |
# Dear Friend,

Fair competition and equality in women’s sports are under threat, and we are fighting for our girls tooth and nail.

The fight is not out in the Olympic arena, it's right on your doorstep, at your child or grandchild's next track meet, basketball game, or overnight volleyball weekend tournament. Today, Texas students are facing the erasure of the distinction of sports categories based on biology, replacing it with sports based on psychology.

What can you do to stop this assault? Support HB 25 Girls Sports Bill.

Texas House Bill 25 (Swanson) requires Texas public school students to compete in interscholastic athletic competition (UIL) based on biological sex as entered on one’s original birth certificate.

This bill will be heard in the Texas House by the Constitutional Rights and Remedies Committee Wednesday, Oct. 6, at 11am. They appear favorable to our cause and it seems to have an opportunity to pass!!

On his first day in office, President Biden issued an executive order saying students should play on sports teams based on their “gender identity.” This overturns nearly 50 years of equal opportunities for women and girls to compete in female-only sports teams.

As a result of this insanity, Texas students are already dealing with biological males participating in female sports.

Science, biology, and common sense expose the unfair advantage biological male athletes possess when pitted against female athletes in competition. This imbalanced competition permanently impacts lives, robbing female students of scholarships and opportunities.

This legislation is key to stopping the nonsense and restoring fair competition.

Per Governor Abbott’s staff, passing HB 25 is the first legislative action that must pass before introducing other key initiatives such as banning the gender modification of minors and protecting college girls’ sports.

_Here's what you can do:_

CALL your legislator's policy director and let them know you support HB 25. Find your representative here! [https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=a32ba51cce&e=01c99b7fbd)
Also, please call Speaker Dade Phelan’s Policy Director, Jay Dyer at 512-463-1000.

ATTEND the hearing in person at the capitol:
House of Representatives
Rm E1004
Constitutional Rights and Remedies Committee, Trent Ashby, Chair
Wednesday, Oct. 6, at 11am

Register online to TESTIFY:
[https://mytxlegis.capitol.texas.gov/hwrspublic/Video/HouseWitnessReg.mp4](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=27006b50c8&e=01c99b7fbd)

[https://mytxlegis.capitol.texas.gov/hwrspublic/about.aspx](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=c7204022ac&e=01c99b7fbd)

Please keep this situation in your prayers.

Blessings,
__
#

body:
| | | **[Did you see what Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams said? They're calling on EVERY American to join them in the fight to DEFEND our democracy after Republicans launched more than 400 voter suppression bills all across the country. Will you answer their call with $3 to protect our pro-voting rights House Democrats? We're calling for 500 gifts before our midnight deadline to defend our House Majority >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)**

Two of our most INCREDIBLE Democratic heroes are teaming up to SAVE voting rights in the wake of vicious Republican attacks on our democracy.

Stacey Abrams sounded the alarm about this DIRE situation:
